listings.area: Bay Harbour Condo 205 / Pool Level / Second Floor
listings.location: Bay Harbour Condo 205 / Pool Level / Second Floor
listings.notes: The apartment’s open-floor concept was specially planned to highlight the Caribbean breathtaking views. Bay Harbour condos are built with top-of-the-line finishes, carefully chosen to accommodate your desire for luxury living and durability. Each unit includes an european-style kitchen, all major appliances, high speed internet and HDTV capabilities. We have all dreamed of five-star living. At Bay Harbour, this desire becomes reality it as soon as you walk into its stunning lobby. Bay Harbour is minutes away from Eagle and Palm Beach, Aruba’s most famous white-sand and turquoise- water beaches: A unique combination of modern living with Caribbean relaxation. Be prepared to experience the pleasures of a luxurious vacation within the comfort of your own home. The Paardenbaai exhibition is just steps away from the project. This art exhibit embraces the Playa District’s history as the main horse trading spot during the Spanish Colonization. There are eight different horses all over town, all of which have a particular name and personality. The Marina is a hot spot for local artists as they showcase their most recent work. Immerse yourself in the Aruban art movement by just taking an elevator to the lower floor, where 20+ spaces have been allocated for local contemporary artists. Bay Harbour is the perfect environment to interact with local talent..

listings.name: Noord Villa
listings.notes: Dream Villa in Noord, Aruba – A Unique Investment Opportunity In the heart of enchanting Noord, Aruba, awaits a property that feels like it was crafted from a dream. Set on an expansive 24,650 sqft (2,290 m²) of meticulously fenced land, this estate offers privacy and security. A grand entrance welcomes you into a space where every detail has been thoughtfully designed. At the center stands the main villa, its terracotta roof and bright walls radiating warmth under the Caribbean sun. Step inside and discover the open-concept living and dining areas, flooded with natural light from large windows that highlight the fine finishes and sophisticated design. The fully equipped kitchen, complete with modern appliances and ample counter space, is perfect for culinary enthusiasts. The bedrooms provide a serene escape, with the main suite featuring an en-suite bathroom that feels like a private sanctuary. Venture outdoors and find yourself immersed in lush greenery and vibrant tropical landscaping. The hotel-resort-style surroundings evoke a sense of tranquility, where the rustling palm trees and the gentle ripple of the exquisite pool set the perfect ambiance. Imagine hosting evening gatherings here, with guests relaxing by the pool under the warm glow of outdoor lights and the gentle Caribbean breeze. Additional living spaces enhance the property’s value. Three separate apartments, each with its own private entrance, provide versatile options. The first is a spacious two-bedroom unit, complete with a kitchen, living area, and bathroom, ideal for long-term guests or generating rental income. The remaining two are cozy studio apartments, each with its own bathroom, perfect for short-term stays or additional rental opportunities. This villa offers not just a beautiful residence but a wise investment. Its prime location in one of Aruba’s most desirable areas ensures that whether you choose to call it home or leverage it for rental income, you’re set to enjoy the best of island living. With pristine beaches, exceptional dining, and vibrant shopping districts nearby, the possibilities are endless. As the sun sets over Noord, the villa’s lights illuminate the property with a warm, welcoming glow. This is a place where memories are created, and every day feels like a vacation. bike gps Property Details: Beds: 7 Baths: 5 Price (in AWG): 3,450,000.- Built up area: 541 m² / 5,823.27 ft² Land Size: 2,290 m² Reference Number: Noord Vill

listings.name: Eagle’s Hidden Gem – Dual-Parcel Estate with Bonus Buildable Lot
listings.notes: Just minutes from world-famous Eagle Beach, this private, move-in-ready two-level villa sits on a rare 1,280 m² of freehold land, combining a beautifully maintained residence with an adjoining bonus buildable lot (459 m² separate title). This configuration offers the flexibility to expand, subdivide, or reconfigure, making it both a luxury home and a strong long-term investment. Property Highlights – Land : 1,280 m² total | Two connected freehold parcels (821 m² + 459 m²) – Zoning : Stedelijk Woongebied (urban residential – medium density) – Construction : Exceptionally solid poured and reinforced concrete throughout – all floors, ceilings, roof, and corner reinforcements ensure durability and hurricane resistance. – Main villa : Two levels, each approx. 93 m² (total 186 m² built) • The downstairs level includes divided rooms (sheetrock partitions), a small kitchen counter with sink and outlets, a toilet, and independent access — ideal for reconfiguration into living units or offices. • With minimal internal adjustments, the space can be converted into one or two full apartments, doubling the home’s bedrooms and bathrooms and creating a 4–6 bedroom, 4-bathroom layout. – Guest/staff quarters : Separate bedroom and bathroom with private access – Outdoor area : Renovated pool with fenced deck, outdoor shower, and toilet – Outdoor living : Large covered patio with full outdoor kitchen and BBQ area – Garden & privacy : Fully paved garden and driveway, with remote-controlled gate and 3.5-meter-high perimeter walls ensuring total privacy. Mature tropical garden with multiple palm trees and lush greenery. – Utilities : Hot and cold water system | 10 kW solar installation | irrigation system | storm shutters throughout – Parking : Secure gated driveway for 2–3 cars, with remote-enabled electric gate Bonus Buildable Lot – 459 m² Freehold Parcel Included in the estate is a second buildable parcel (459 m² freehold) with its own meetbrief (confirming ownership and cadastral boundaries). This adjoining lot is fully fenced and accessible from the same gated entrance, offering multiple options: – Build a second residence, guest villa, or rental units – Extend the tropical garden or pool area for additional privacy – Subdivide and sell as a separate property in the future Investment Potential – Dual-parcel flexibility : Each parcel has its own meetbrief, allowing independent sale, new construction, or combined estate use. – Ready-to-convert lower level : Alrea

listings.name: Pos Abao Residence with Apartment
listings.notes: Welcome to Pos Abou Residence & Apartment Nestled in the sought-after neighborhood of Pos Abou, Noord, this elegant 2-story home is now available for sale. Boasting 4 generously sized bedrooms and 3 bathrooms, this residence is set on a spacious 591m² long lease lot with a total built-up area of 250.8m². The apartment is built on a separate lot of property land with size 237 m2 and features 1 spacious bedroom and 2 bathrooms. Upon entering, you are welcomed by a charming foyer that leads into a cozy living room, seamlessly flowing into the dining area and a well-appointed kitchen. One road is the main road from Tanki Leendert to Paradera and the other is a branch from it which leads in the direction of Modanza. listings.name: Palm Aruba Condo
listings.notes: Beautiful 2-Bedroom Condo for Sale in Palm Aruba, where Every Sunset Feels Like Yours!The late afternoon sun drifts gently across the sky as you turn into the gated entrance of Palm Aruba, a quiet oasis tucked into the vibrant heart of Palm Beach. Outside, the sky begins its transformation gold melting into orange, then deepening into shades of pink and violet. The sunset becomes part of your daily rhythm, a quiet spectacle that never feels ordinary. It’s not just a view; it’s a ritual.Life here extends beyond your front door. A short walk leads you to the pool, where palm trees sway gently in the breeze. The gym is there when you want it, the landscaped grounds always inviting. And just beyond the gates, Palm Beach offers everything soft white sand, turquoise water, lively evenings, and endless choice.This isn’t just a condo. It’s a place where days feel lighter, evenings feel richer, and every moment carries a touch of island ease.And it’s waiting for you.Contact us today for more information or to schedule a viewing!

listings.name: Malmokweg 29
listings.notes: Welcome to Villa Marina, an exceptional luxury estate in the prestigious neighborhood of Malmok, one of Aruba’s most desirable residential areas. Ideally located just minutes from Aruba’s world-famous beaches, high-rise hotels, restaurants, and entertainment, this remarkable property offers the perfect combination of luxury living and investment potential.

listings.name: La Colina 20 - Exceptional Estate in Tierra del Sol
listings.notes: From both the kitchen and living areas, there is a seamless connection to the outdoor spaces, where indoor and outdoor living truly come together. One of the most distinctive features of this property is the intimate outdoor setting that includes aprivate, beach-style lounging area, enhancing the resort-like feel of the estate. Adding to the uniqueness of La Colina 20 is theseparate guesthouse, which is fully self-contained and generously sized. It offers2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, a private kitchen, laundry facilities, and comfortable living areas, making it ideal for guests, extended family, or staff accommodations while maintaining complete privacy. The property also includes alarge storage areaand a2-car garage, further enhancing functionality without compromising on aesthetics.

listings.name: Turnkey Mixed-Use Apartment Building with Commercial Tenant
listings.notes: An exceptional opportunity to acquire afully stabilized, income-producing mixed-use buildingin one of Aruba’s most desirable and rapidly appreciating locations. Perfectly positioned in Rooi Santo, Noord — justthree minutes from Fisherman’s Hut Beach— this sophisticated property blendsluxury residential living with a well-established commercial tenant, offering immediate returns and long-term value.

listings.name: Savaneta 222 Villa 1
listings.notes: The villa is designed for effortless indoor-outdoor living. A fully equipped modern kitchen makes entertaining a pleasure, while the spacious outdoor entertainment area, complete with a BBQ, invites you to enjoy unforgettable gatherings with family and friends. Cool off in your private swimming pool overlooking the ocean or relax on one of the two private balconies, both offering breathtaking panoramic views of the Caribbean Sea.

listings.name: Luxury Renovated Villa Steps from the Ocean | L.G. Smith Blvd 532 C
listings.notes: Within less than a minute, you reach the ocean, with some of Aruba’s most beautiful beaches — Boca Catalina, Tres Trapi, and Arashi — all within walking distance. The iconic California Lighthouse, the scenic dunes, and the rugged north coast are just around the corner, while Tierra del Sol’s 18-hole golf course and the vibrant Palm Beach strip are only minutes away.

listings.name: Spaans Lagoenweg 38
listings.notes: This home is designed for both comfortable everyday living and unforgettable gatherings. The generous layout flows seamlessly from indoors to outdoors, creating the perfect setting for hosting family events, celebrations, or simply enjoying Aruba’s year-round sunshine.

listings.name: Picaron 19C - 3206 m² Property land
listings.notes: Whether you are looking for a solid investment, a multi-family purchase, or a place to enjoy together with friends or relatives, Picaron 19C is perfectly suited for buyers who want to combine lifestyle and return on investment. It is also an ideal opportunity for those planning ahead for retirement, a peaceful paradise to enjoy while generating income in the meantime.

listings.name: 8-Unit - Boutique Apartment Complex - INCL Hotel Permit
listings.notes: For Sale: Exclusive Boutique Apartment Complex on the Beautiful Island of Aruba''A Rare Unique Gem Offering Exceptional Return of Investment – Your Next Opportunity Awaits in Calbas!"Discover a one-of-a-kind investment opportunity on the sunny island of Aruba. This stunning boutique apartment complex,, is truly an extraordinary find. Offering great value, a strong and consistent income stream, and a highly sought-after location, this property is the ultimate investment opportunity for savvy investors seeking unmatched potential. With itsturn-key operation,high-valued hotel permit, andproven Return on Investment (ROI), this property offers an unmatched opportunity to establish your first thriving business in the Caribbean or enhance your portfolio with a premier, high-performing asset."

listings.name: Caya Cana Canto di Lama 40, Tierra Del Sol
listings.notes: The first floor features an impressive master suite with a walk-in closet and a luxurious en-suite bathroom, along with an additional bedroom with its own private bathroom. This level also hosts the main living areas, including a stylish living room, a well-appointed kitchen, and a dedicated dining area, perfectly designed for both everyday living and entertaining.The second floor offers four additional bedrooms, each with a bathroom, making the layout ideal for families, guests, or rental use. The villa is furnished with high-quality finishes and thoughtfully curated interiors, making it move-in or rental ready.

listings.name: Villa Bella Luna - Calbas
listings.notes: At the heart of the home, a striking all-white contemporary kitchen beckons with minimalist elegance and practical luxury—ready to inspire your culinary creativity. The open-concept design invites you to entertain with ease or simply unwind in the sunlit, ocean-facing living spaces.

listings.name: Esmeralda 87 | Malmok
listings.notes: With 273m² of interior space, the villa is designed to make the most of Aruba’s sunny lifestyle. Step outside to your private saltwater pool, finished with premium Diamond Brite for smooth, lasting beauty. The layout allows constant wind circulation, keeping the area cool and comfortable throughout the day. A mature tropical garden surrounds the property, creating a peaceful, private atmosphere. Lush greenery and vibrant plants provide natural seclusion, making the outdoor space feel like a personal retreat.

listings.name: Alto Vista 45-A
listings.notes: Perched gracefully in the scenic hills of Alto Vista, this three-story luxury villa offers an unparalleled blend of elegance, comfort, and breathtaking views. Spanning 762m² of lease land, this remarkable 4-bedroom, 4.5-bathroom property is designed for those who seek tranquility, style, and convenience just minutes from Aruba’s most beautiful beaches.

listings.name: Jamanota 19D
listings.notes: Welcome to this beautiful hilltop property, located on the elevated east side of Aruba in the peaceful area of Jamanota. This home, set on property land, 2750m2, offers the perfect combination of comfort and countryside living, situated on a spacious lot with a total build size of approximately 491m² (Main house ±306m² and two apartments ±185m² combined).

listings.name: Matadera 16-F
listings.notes: The estate features a beautifully designed4-bedroom main residence, offering generous living space and modern comforts. The open-concept layout of the home is complemented by soaring cathedral ceilings, creating a bright and airy atmosphere throughout. An expansive L-shaped porch allows for ultimate relaxation, providing the perfect spot to enjoy the warm Aruban sunshine. For outdoor enjoyment, the property boasts a tropical pool with a beach volleyball and tennis court, ideal for both relaxation and entertainment.

listings.name: Opal 217
listings.notes: On your own private balcony, savor panoramic views of the ocean and embrace the essence of a tropical paradise. Step into luxury as you pass through the inviting entryway, where a world of comfort awaits. The expansive living area welcomes you with open arms, gracefully complemented by a stylish stairway. The seamless layout effortlessly transitions into a dining area and an inviting living room, providing ample space for entertaining guests or unwinding with loved ones.

listings.name: Modern Villa in Babijn 21L
listings.notes: Outside, a beautifully landscaped garden provides unobstructed views over protected nature grounds a rare privilege on the island. Multiple terraces, a wooden deck, and a private pool make this the ideal space for relaxing, entertaining, or simply soaking in the peace and privacy.

listings.name: Esmeralda 42-B - Brand New Home
listings.notes: Completed less than a year ago, this contemporary villa blendssleek modern architecturewith Caribbean warmth, natural light, and thoughtful functionality. The home features4 bedrooms— including one ideal as a private office — and2 stylish bathrooms, plus an additionalhalf bath in the lush gardenfor outdoor ease.

listings.name: San Fuego 28A
listings.notes: The residence features 6 spacious bedrooms and 4.5 bathrooms, providing ample space for family, guests, and entertaining. The layout seamlessly balances openness with intimacy, creating an inviting atmosphere for both family life and social gatherings. On the ground floor, you will find a spacious living room, a half-open dining room, and kitchen. This level also includes two bedrooms, one full en-suite bathroom, and a guest toilet. Upstairs, the three bedrooms offer exceptional views, space, and comfort. A spacious one-bedroom apartment further enhances the villa, providing private accommodation ideal for guests, rental purposes, or use as a home office.

listings.name: Tunastraat 14
listings.notes: Nestled in a central spot on Tunastraat, this impressive property offers comfort and convenience in equal measure. Featuring 6 bedrooms and 6 bathrooms, it's designed to meet your every need. Upstairs, a cozy studio apartment awaits, boasting its own entrance and a welcoming open living space. Outside, a refreshing pool and spacious garden provide the perfect setting for relaxation and outdoor enjoyment.

listings.name: Kamay 75
listings.notes: At the heart of the home lies its true centerpiece: a sleek Bohemian-inspired kitchen. Featuring a grand island, clean modern lines, and windows all around that flood the space with natural light, the open-concept kitchen flows effortlessly into the living area. A cozy reading nook adds warmth and character, while French doors extend the living space outdoors, capturing the essence of Caribbean indoor-outdoor living.

listings.name: Paradera 225
listings.notes: The upper level welcomes you with a bright and expansive living area that flows seamlessly into a modern kitchen with an island — perfect for entertaining or everyday living. French doors open onto a spacious terrace where breathtaking 180° panoramic views stretch across the island and all the way to the Caribbean Sea.

listings.name: Pos Abao 32M
listings.notes: At the back of the house, a large patio opens up to a generous outdoor living space with multiple seating areas and a beautiful swimming pool, perfect for relaxing and enjoying Aruba’s outdoor lifestyle. At the front of the property, there is private parking on the premises, surrounded by a landscaped garden that adds to the charm of the home.

listings.name: Turn-Key 4-Bedroom Villa Near Eagle Beach | Pos Abao 10 F

Set on 607 m² of full ownership land, the fully gated property has been thoughtfully redesigned into a stylish and move-in-ready island retreat with exceptional rental and lifestyle potential.

listings.name: Home Ruby 53 Noord Malmok Area

From the living spaces flooded with natural light to the contemporary kitchen connected with big sliding doors to the pool area and bar, this home consist  the entertainer's paradise.

listings.name: Palm Beach 74

listings.name: Aruba Countryside Opportunity | Solid Home + Expansion Potential

This is a turnkey property, fully furnished and comes with reservations already booked in 2025.

listings.name: Montana 39 G
listings.notes: Welcome to this cozy two-story villa located in the quiet neighborhood of Montana. Set on a generous 882m² lot, the home is just a 5-minute drive from white sand beaches and close to supermarkets – perfect for easy island living.

listings.name: Boroncana 114
listings.notes: Welcome to your own piece of paradise. Located in a quiet and pleasant residential area in Noord, this charming home offers a great mix of comfort, privacy, and island living. The property is just a short drive from the high-rise hotel area and Aruba’s beautiful white-sand beaches.

listings.name: Rooi Koochi 3A
listings.notes: Rooi Koochi is a neighborhood in Aruba, and its unique features are its location in the tranquil, natural area of Savaneta and its distinctive residential architecture, which often features classical or modern Aruban "Cunucu" house styles. The area is known for its peaceful surroundings, green nature, rolling hills, and proximity to the coast and local cultural sites like the Lourdes Grotto

listings.name: Tanki Leendert 121-N
listings.notes: The outdoor space is where the Aruba lifestyle truly comes alive. A spacious covered patio overlooks the 2-year-old pool, creating a breezy, shaded area perfect for relaxing or entertaining. The well-kept tropical garden surrounds the home with privacy and color, while two separate seating areas offer inviting spots to enjoy morning coffee, afternoon sun, or a tasty burger from the grill. Practical touches like the outdoor storage room and the tiled on-property parking space add convenience without compromising the home’s serene atmosphere.

listings.name: Tamarijn 12-F - Amazing Views & Exceptional Potential
listings.notes: This property provides the perfect opportunity for a buyer with vision to transform the residence into a modern hillside retreat. While the home does requiresome tender love and care, it presents a rare chance to create a spacious contemporary family residence in a truly remarkable location. Adding to the versatility of the property is alarge basement level and a guesthouse, which offers excellent potential for a hobby room, creative studio, workshop, gym, or additional functional space depending on the needs of the future owner. The elevated setting ensures privacy and tranquility while still being located within the desirableTamarijn neighborhood, known for its peaceful residential character and natural surroundings.

listings.name: 4 Bedroom Villa in Noord
listings.notes: Step inside and be greeted by a bright, open-conceptliving, dining, and kitchen areawith soaringcathedral ceilingsthat create a spacious, airy feel. The home isfully air-conditioned, yet thanks to its location near the natural east side of Noord, a refreshing breeze flows through the house all day long. Enjoy thebeautiful backyard, perfect for entertaining with itscovered porch and inviting pool,ideal for evening dinners, barbecues, or just relaxing under the Aruban sky during the Sunset!

listings.name: Orcuyo 24 – Tranquility, Views & Future Potential
listings.notes: The property offers tremendous potential both inside and out. While some finishing touches and landscaping improvements remain to be completed, this creates aunique opportunity for a buyer to personalize the property and transform it into a truly special residence.The existing layout and spacious lot provide an excellent canvas for creating a private tropical retreat tailored to individual preferences. Outdoor living is already enhanced by the addition of a swimming pool, creating the perfect starting point for a future garden oasis. From the backyard, residents canenjoy beautiful views of the Hooiberg, providing a picturesque backdrop and a daily reminder of Aruba’s natural beauty.

listings.name: Noord Cura Cabai 45C
listings.notes: The house offers 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, including a master bedroom with its own bathroom and walk-in closet. The kitchen, living room, and dining area flow nicely together, creating a comfortable living space for family and friends.

listings.notes: Experience the best of island living in this stylish villa, perfectly located in the peaceful and scenic area of Ayo. Set on a generous900 m²of long lease land and offering226 m²of refined living space, this property beautifully blends comfort, design, and natural beauty.

listings.name: Turibana 32

listings.name: Casa Treasure Price on request!!!!
listings.notes: IntroducingCasa Treasure, a unique and amazing investment opportunity available by silent listing for serious buyers only. This well-maintained apartment complex features 18 units, 12 studios and 6 spacious 2-bedroom apartments; perfectly suited for long-term rental. Strategically designed for maximum return, the property offers both privacy and potential, making it a rare gem in Aruba’s real estate market.Serious investors onlyare invited to explore this exceptional opportunity.

listings.name: CASA Bon Bini
listings.notes: For those desiring a more intimate ambiance, Model 2 showcases 12 basic apartments, each consisting of one bedroom with a Queen bed and one bathroom, providing a cozy sanctuary spanning 40 square meters of tastefully designed simplicity. Ideal for those who value compact yet sophisticated living quarters.

listings.name: Casa Luminosa
listings.notes: The property’s smart layout and versatile design make it easy to adapt and expand. Investors can choose to keep it as a steady, income-generating rental property, transform it into a short-stay vacation hotspot, or develop it into a unique mixed-use concept that stands out in Aruba’s growing hospitality industry.

listings.name: CASA Distinct
listings.notes: Now let's take you on a stroll through the perfectly landscaped outside space. Take a refreshing plunge from the diving board into the depths of the pool or relax in the outdoor Jacuzzi. Gatherings around the fire pit or hanging out at the BBQ Grill are guaranteed fun  and outdoor dining in this house gives a whole new twist to dining Al Fresco with views that last for days! The LED lights infused in the pool should add instant ambiance at any social event and the well maintained garden will keep the moment magical thanks to the automated irrigation system.

listings.name: CASA Warehouse Pos Chiquito
listings.notes: This warehouse facility presents a prime opportunity for businesses seeking a centrally located, spacious, and well-structured facility to streamline their operations. The thoughtful layout, combined with the strategic location, makes it an ideal choice for those in search of a functional and accessible commercial space in Aruba.

listings.name: CASA Atlantic 360 (Penthouse)
listings.notes: This3-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom penthouseis designed for bothluxury living and high-yield investment potential. Each suite functions as aprivate retreat with its own ensuite bathroom, including a master suite with a private balcony anduninterrupted ocean views. The spacious floor plan comfortably accommodates up to12 guests, making it ideal for families, vacation rentals, or a sophisticated island escape.

listings.name: CASA Paradera Lot
listings.notes: Nestled close to key attractions and amenities, the location provides an ideal setting for various types of development projects. Whether your vision includes a residential community, a commercial enterprise, or a recreational facility, this property’s prime location and generous size make it an excellent choice.

listings.name: CASA HideAway
listings.notes: The main house has 5 bedrooms, spread out over 2 floors. The primary bedroom is located on the second floor and has it's own en-suite bathroom including a nice big bathtub, walk-in closet balcony and hallway, making it the perfect private suite to escape after a long day of all the hustle and bustle. On the other side of the second floor are the 2nd & 3rd bedrooms with the shared 2nd bathroom, also with a tub. The ground floor is accessed through the majestical entrance that leads to the fully equipped kitchen, fit for a chef. The kitchen is open concept to the dining room on one side and half open concept to the separate living room on the other side. Next to the dining room is a study / office space that can be closed off for privacy. The ground floor also provides a half bath for guests and a separate laundry room. Attached to the main house is an extra apartment/in-law suite, with a bathroom and kitchen/living room. This apartment is accessible from the inside and outside.

listings.name: CASA Le Vente unit 508
listings.notes: Situated within a luxurious condominium resort, this property offers an exclusive ocean view that serves as a daily reminder of the beauty and tranquility of the Caribbean coast. From the spacious balcony, residents can bask in the captivating sight of the azure waters meeting the powdery white sands, creating an ambiance of unparalleled serenity.

listings.name: CASA Triple BBB
listings.notes: CASA Triple BBB is the place to live!!!!.  ThisBest, veryBest and can not beBetter property is located in North Aruba just 2 minutes walk to the ocean to kite surf, surf and al kind of other water activities, shopping mall with al its entertainment; cinema, shops, the finest restaurant and bars. Just around the corner of the High Rise Hotel Area and Casinos.'Just the perfect spot to live.

listings.name: Koyari 37A - La Casa Più Bella
listings.notes: The interior offers a spacious layout, modern kitchen, and multiple lounging areas. Step outside and you’ll find your private resort: a sparkling pool,soothing jacuzzi, palapa for shaded relaxation, full BBQ setup,and a tropical garden. Guests enjoy an outdoor shower and dedicated changing room for comfort and convenience.

listings.name: Exclusive Luxury Villa at Malmok
listings.notes: Indulge in the ultimate luxury living experience with this exceptional villa, located just steps away from the pristine beaches of Malmok. Positioned in one of Aruba’s most sought-after neighborhoods, this magnificent property seamlessly blends sophistication with comfort, offering a truly unparalleled island lifestyle.

listings.name: Caya Musica 14-E
listings.notes: * The master bathroom is a luxurious retreat, featuring an elegant freestanding bathtub, an enclosed toilet room, and a large electronically controlled privacy glass window that offers stunning backyard views.

listings.name: Santorini Style Villa at Alto Vista
listings.notes: Introducing this fully renovated and fully furnished two-story Santorini-style Villa situated on a spacious 1156 m² parcel on a scenic hill of Alto Vista and providing a relaxing retreat with breathtaking views, ultimate privacy, and exceptional comfort living. The property features a 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom main house, two apartments, patios and terraces, and an exclusive pool and jacuzzi.

listings.name: Ocean View Estate with Rental Income Potential – Alto Vista, Aruba
listings.notes: Whether you're seeking a luxury private residence, an income-producing investment, or a combination of both, Alto Vista 117 offers exceptional flexibility. listings.name: San Barbola Residence 277
listings.notes: The fully fenced property offers an inviting outdoor setting with a swimming pool featuring an integrated jacuzzi, gazebo, and beautifully landscaped tropical garden with several trees and greenery. Whether relaxing by the pool, dining under the covered patio, or spending time with family and friends outdoors, the property provides ample space to enjoy Aruba's year-round climate. The rooftop terrace adds an additional outdoor living area, ideal for entertaining, relaxing, or simply enjoying the island breeze.

listings.name: Kibrahachastraat 5
listings.notes: Discover your own piece of paradise in the heart of Ponton, Aruba, with this extraordinary property that offers a truly unique and versatile living experience. Nestled on a sprawling 1517 m² property land, this stunning estate is a dream come true, combining luxury living with fantastic income potential. Let's take a closer look at what this property has to offer:

listings.name: Seroe blanco 45d
listings.notes: A HOME THAT COMMANDS ATTENTIONThe exterior speaks before you even step inside. Terracotta clay roof tiles crown the striking grey metropolis façade, visible even from above — as the dramatic aerial views reveal a property that dominates its corner with quiet authority. Mature palms, flowering desert roses, and manicured garden beds soften the architecture into something that feels both regal and welcoming. String-lit evenings under the solar-panelled carport canopy transform the courtyard into an entertainer's dream.INTERIORS DESIGNED FOR THE DISCERNINGStep inside the main residence and be greeted by brilliant white ceilings, recessed lighting, and an open living space that flows effortlessly between zones. The living room makes a bold design statement — rich dark leather sectional seating, a vivid red shag rug, and a gallery-scale rose artwork create a space that is simultaneously dramatic and deeply comfortable. A wall-mounted entertainment system and arc floor lamp complete the picture of effortless sophistication.The kitchen is a chef's delight: pristine white shaker cabinetry reaches ceiling height, black granite countertops provide striking contrast, and top-line stainless appliances — including a gas range, built-in microwave, and deep double sink — make entertaining a pleasure rather than a chore. Every surface, every fitting, has been chosen with care.SPACE, PRIVACY, AND VERSATILITYWith four bedrooms the main house and three apartments, five bathrooms, and multiple independent living areas — each with its own kitchen and split-unit air conditioning — this property gives everyone their own world while keeping the family beautifully connected. The upper floor master retreat offers a peaceful sanctuary, accessed by an elegant open wooden staircase with a sculptural balustrade.SUN, ENERGY & SUSTAINABILITYAruba's golden sun does more than warm your mornings here — a ±10 kW solar panel system mounted on the carport roof keeps energy costs low and your environmental conscience clear. The property is fully connected to electricity, water, cable, and features a security camera system throughout.THE NUMBERS THAT JUSTIFY EVERY DOLLAROfficially appraised in March 2026 by ARCOTEC N.V. at a market value of USD 1,016,292.13 this property is priced with purpose below the market value, What you see in the asking price is not speculation; it is substance, quality, and enduring value confirmed by independent experts.This is not a property you simply buy. It is one you experience, fall in love with, and never want to leave.Schedule your private viewing today — some homes deserve to be felt in person.

listings.name: Esmeralda 32
listings.notes: This exceptional property, located in a prime area, is not just a home, but a canvas for a world of possibilities. Featuring a spacious main house with 2 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms, alongside two separate 1-bedroom apartments, Esmeralda 32 offers unparalleled versatility.

listings.name: Seroe Alejandro 18-D
listings.notes: Whether you are searching for a primary residence, a vacation retreat, or an investment opportunity, Seroe Alejandro 18-D presents an exceptional opportunity to acquire a beautifully updated home with modern comforts, outstanding outdoor living spaces, and lasting value. Conveniently located just north of the main road connecting Pos Chiquito and San Nicolas, the property enjoys a quiet residential setting while remaining within easy reach of beaches, schools, shops, restaurants, and other everyday amenities.

listings.name: Bucutiweg 5
listings.notes: When entering this waterfront villa you will be greeted by a bright and airy open floor plan. The house features an open spacious living room, open dining room, and open kitchen. This home offers 3 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms plus an extra 1 bedroom and 1 bathroom apartment with its own entrance and kitchen. As well there is a big pool in the spacious garden in the back of the villa.

listings.name: Washington 42D
listings.notes: Experience the pinnacle of elegance and comfort in thisexquisite 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom luxury residencenestled in the tranquil and highly sought-after neighborhood ofWashington, Noord. Designed with sophistication in mind, this home blends refined finishes with modern convenience and the perfect retreat for discerning buyers seeking privacy, space, and style.

listings.name: Seroe Blanco 52-L
listings.notes: Inside, an open and airy layout seamlessly connects the living, dining, and kitchen areas, creating a welcoming atmosphere for both everyday living and entertaining. The home features four spacious bedrooms, including one currently used as a home office, along with two well-appointed bathrooms. The fully equipped kitchen with breakfast bar serves as the heart of the home, while the adjacent laundry room adds everyday convenience. Quality finishes enhance both comfort and efficiency, including PVC exterior doors with double glazing and a combination of cedarwood, PVC, and aluminum window frames that reflect durability and thoughtful craftsmanship. Adding to the home’s versatility is a private one-bedroom apartment with an ensuite bathroom attached to the garage. This space is ideal for guests, extended family, a private workspace, or potential rental income.

listings.name: Caya Areroet 16
listings.notes: The front of the house has two designer entrances with beautiful wooden details. The car entrance with a unique wooden electric gate to the driveway (parking space for 4-5 cars) that leads to the amazing garden and the back door. The other entrance comes with a very nice floating staircase to the front door and front porch with a view of the island.

listings.name: Babijn 21F
listings.notes: The master bedroom features an en-suite bathroom and a walk-in closet, offering comfort and privacy. Two additional bedrooms share the second bathroom, making the layout practical and well-suited for families or guests. From the office windows, you look directly onto a striking natural stone wall, and from the master bedroom and bathroom, a dramatic roof-height rock formation becomes a unique and grounding design element: constant reminders of the natural surroundings that define this home.

listings.name: Gray Door Apartments - Commercial Investment
listings.notes: Three ground-floor apartments boast two bedrooms and two bathrooms, while four one-bedroom apartments are on the first floor. The garden one-bedroom apartment is conveniently located on the ground floor. The stunning penthouse, with two bedrooms and two bathrooms, offers breathtaking views of Aruba. It comes complete with a private driveway, elevator, and a jacuzzi on the terrace. The master suite is a true sanctuary, featuring an open bathroom with a bathtub, double shower, and a 10-foot projector screen for your entertainment.

listings.name: Luxurious Penthouse Offering Breathtaking Aruba Views

rentals.name: Arashi Beachfront
rentals.notes: The villa is nestled in the prestigious Malmok Beach area of Aruba, celebrated for its stunning beaches and peaceful environment. Guests enjoy immediate access to Arashi Beach. The villa is close to the bay Boca Catalina, perfect for snorkeling and swimming, and the California lighthouse. For dining and entertainment, the nearby Ritz-Carlton and Palm Beach high-rise hotels offer luxurious resort-level amenities. Arashi Beach Shack is conveniently located just 1 minute from the villa, a perfect spot for a quick bite or a refreshing cocktail during sunset. Malmok combines serene surroundings with convenient access to Aruba’s top attractions, making it an ideal location for relaxation and exploration.

rentals.name: Azul Tide - Bohemian Villa
rentals.notes: Welcome to Villa Azul Tide, your private tropical escape in the heart of downtown Oranjestad, Aruba.From the moment you arrive, you will feel the perfect balance of modern comfort and relaxed bohemian beach vibes. Tucked just a short walk from the iconic Renaissance Wind Creek Aruba Resort and the vibrant energy of downtown, this beautifully renovated 3 bedroom villa offers the ideal setting for your Aruba getaway.Step inside and you are greeted by a bright open living space designed for connection and comfort. The living room, dining area, and fully equipped kitchen flow together effortlessly, creating the perfect space for morning coffee, shared meals, and easy evenings after a day in the sun. With full air conditioning throughout and high speed WiFi, you will stay cool, comfortable, and connected.Each of the three bedrooms features a plush queen size bed, inviting you to unwind and recharge in your own peaceful retreat. Inside the villa are two full bathrooms with reliable hot water from a tankless system, plus a convenient outdoor half bathroom near the pool area, making poolside days even more enjoyable.And then there is the outdoor space.Your private pool is surrounded by lush tropical greenery, creating a calm oasis right in the center of town. Lounge in the sun, take a refreshing dip, or gather around the outdoor dining area for relaxed dinners under the Aruba sky. This is where memories are made.We also provide beach towels, lightweight chairs, and a cooler so your island adventures are effortless. With parking directly in front of the villa and an onsite laundry room, everything you need for a comfortable stay is right here.When you are ready to explore, you are perfectly located within walking distance to restaurants, shopping, entertainment, and cultural attractions. Spend the day at the beach, enjoy waterfront dining, explore local history, or simply relax by your private pool. The choice is yours.Villa Azul Tide is more than just a place to stay. It is your home in Aruba and we would love to host you.Special Features of the Home• Private pool surrounded by tropical greenery• Fully air conditioned throughout• High speed WiFi• 3 bedrooms with queen beds• 2 full bathrooms inside plus 1 outdoor half bathroom• Tankless hot water system• Fully equipped kitchen• Onsite laundry room• Beach towels, chairs, and cooler provided• Parking directly in front of the villa• 24/7 guest support• All utilities includedNearby Attractions• Renaissance Island Famous for its flamingos and crystal clear turquoise waters• Surfside Beach Calm, swimmable beach just minutes from downtown• Renaissance Marketplace Open air dining, shopping, and nightlife• Fort Zoutman Aruba’s oldest historic landmark and museum• Main Street (Caya G. F. Betico Croes) Colorful downtown shopping, cafés, and local boutiquesImportant NotesParties, social events, and gatherings are not allowed. Concierge services are available to help you plan the perfect Aruba experience.

rentals.name: Jolie Villa
rentals.notes: Villa Jolie is a modern, private villa with a spacious outdoor area featuring a pool, elevated tub, BBQ, and rooftop terrace, just minutes from Aruba’s famous beaches. Inside, find three bedrooms, a fully equipped kitchen, and cozy living spaces, all secured within a gated property. This villa boasts breathtaking views of Aruba’s natural landscapes, creating an ideal setting for your dream getaway.Highlights• Spacious back patio: the outside area contains multiple areas; a poolside lounge area, a rooftop terrace offering stunning panoramic views, and a covered veranda including a dining area with a BBQ for some great meal experiences.• Comfortable sunroom: this area is a cozy space with large windows that let in plenty of natural light, ideal for relaxing with a book or enjoying quiet moments indoors or a great spot to lounge away from the sun. Are you on a workation, your desk with pool view is awaiting you.• Fully equipped kitchen: the kitchen features ample counter space and storage for convenience, is perfect for self-catering and enjoying meals with family and friends, and connects seamlessly to the living and dining areas for easy entertaining.• Perfect location: Villa Jolie is located in a quiet residential area of Noord. It is just a 5-minute drive to Aruba’s famous Palm Beach and Eagle Beach. Big supermarkets are 10 minutes away, and a small supermarket is just 3 minutes away. You have easy access to local dining, shopping, and attractions while enjoying peace and privacy.Amenities• Air conditioning throughout the villa• High-speed Wi-Fi throughout the villa for seamless connectivity• Gated property with an alarm system for security• Smart TV with streaming services• Guest restroom and poolside shower for convenience• Onsite parking available behind the gates for convenience• Washer and dryer• Beach towels, lightweight chairs, and cooler provided for beach days• 24/7 guest supportLocationNoord is known for its beautiful beaches, excellent dining options, and vibrant atmosphere. Visit nearby attractions such as Eagle Beach, Palm Beach, and the California Lighthouse. Enjoy water sports, shopping, and exploring the local culture – all within easy reach. This property is located about a 8-minutes drive to Boca Catalina/ Arashi and a 5-minutes drive to Palm Beach Area / Eagle Beach, rated one of the best beaches on the One Happy Island, Aruba.Book Your Stay Don’t miss the opportunity to experience this luxurious vacation home in Aruba. Whether you’re seeking relaxation or adventure, this property offers everything you need for an unforgettable stay. Book now and start counting down the days to your modern Caribbean chic retreat! Please be advised that Parties, social events and gatherings are not allowed at our vacation homes. Remember to take advantage of our concierge services! All utilities are included.

The parking space is located in front of the building, easily accessible via the main road.You can also reach this building via the back of the building, since The parking lot of The Hospital of Aruba is directly connected. Previously home to the Hard Rock Café, it offers a vibrant atmosphere for downtown visitors.

Keycard access, a communal garden area for lunch breaks, and ample parking space are among the amenities.The office space is conveniently located within walking distance of Gloria Cinema, pharmacies, restaurants, and cafes.The rental contract is based on a four-year lease. Price has room for negotiation.Contact us now for a viewing, and turn this fantastic office space into your new home!
