rentals.notes: Introducing a prime commercial office rental ! Discover this exquisite 100 square meter modern luxury space. Situated in a highly sought after location on Aruba, this office boasts ocean view and the vibrant L.G.Smith Blvd.

rentals.name: Island Haven
rentals.notes: Island Haven Escape to paradise in this newly renovated, modern villa located in the heart of Noord, just minutes from the world-famous Palm Beach and the vibrant high-rise hotel area. Whether you're seeking sun-soaked adventure or peaceful relaxation, this villa is your perfect home base on the “One Happy Island”. Step inside and feel instantly at ease. With 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a fully fenced yard for complete privacy, this home offers both comfort and security. Outside, enjoy the brand-new private swimming pool, lounge under the spacious palapa, and soak up the tropical vibes all day long. Step into a bright, open living room that invites you to relax with its comfortable sitting area and large Smart TV—ideal for cozy evenings or lazy afternoons after the beach. The modern open kitchen is fully equipped with all the appliances and essentials you need to cook and dine at home, whether it’s a quick breakfast or a family dinner. The master bedroom is a peaceful retreat, featuring a king-size bed, ample closet space, a Smart TV, and a private ensuite bathroom complete with hot water. The second and third bedrooms are equally inviting, each offering a queen-size bed, their own Smart TV, and plenty of storage space. A second bathroom is conveniently located in the hallway and also includes hot water and modern fixtures. Outside, the villa truly shines! The spacious backyard features a brand-new swimming pool surrounded by sun loungers for soaking up the Aruban sun. There’s a shaded lounge area for relaxing in comfort, and a large palapa that’s perfect for outdoor dining. Also, there is a BBQ grill for delicious cookouts, and a laundry room equipped with a washer and dryer for your convenience. The entire property is fully fenced, offering privacy, safety, and peace of mind throughout your stay.

rentals.name: Kukwisa Retreat
rentals.notes: Kukwisa Retreat With its unbeatable location, just a short stroll from crystal-clear waters and white sandy beaches, this apartment is your gateway to the best of island living. Whether you’re here for adventure or relaxation, this hidden gem is your home away from home! This cozy and inviting two-bedroom, one-bathroom apartment offers all the comforts of home, just a few minutes’ walk from the breathtaking Mangel Halto Beach. Step inside to find a spacious living room with an open kitchen, fully equipped with modern appliances for all your culinary needs. The master bedroom features a queen bed, while the second bedroom offers both a queen bed and an additional single bed. Unwind in your private outdoor space, complete with a BBQ grill and a relaxing sitting area. Whether you are savoring a meal al fresco or enjoying the peaceful surroundings, this secluded area is perfect for making lasting memories. (Please note that there is no hot water available)

rentals.name: Villa Martha - 3BR Villa
rentals.notes: Villa Martha Escape to this charming 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom Aruban-style vacation home that perfectly blends comfort and traditional island architecture. With an open floor plan and a soaring cathedral ceiling, the interior feels bright and spacious. The cozy living room features an L-shaped sofa and a flat-screen TV, seamlessly extending to an outdoor sitting area where you can enjoy morning coffee. The fully equipped kitchen is designed for convenience, offering ample space and modern amenities. Adjacent to the kitchen, a dining area features a bar-style table with seating for four. The master bedroom offers a plush king-sized bed and an en-suite bathroom with a sink, shower, and toilet. The second and third bedrooms each have comfortable queen beds and share access to a second bathroom with a shower, sink, and toilet. The outdoor area is a highlight, boasting a spacious covered seating area perfect for dining or lounging in the shade. A BBQ grill is available for enjoying meals, while the sparkling new swimming pool, serves as the centerpiece of the backyard—a private oasis for cooling off after a day of exploring Aruba. Whether you're here for a family getaway or a relaxing retreat with friends, this house offers the perfect island escape.

rentals.name: Azure for Jen - Golf & Waterview Condo
rentals.notes: Azure for Jen - Golf & Waterview Condo Welcome to your perfect island escape at our spacious Golf & Waterview Condo, located on the second floor of the beautiful Divi Village Golf & Beach Resort. Just across the street from the soft white sands of Druif Beach. Now under new ownership, the condo has been refreshed with your comfort in mind. It features a comfortable king-sized bed, along with two pull-out sofas in the living area, ideal to sleep 4. The open-plan layout includes a fully equipped kitchen, as well as the convenience of an in-unit washer and dryer. The condo is fully air-conditioned, offers complimentary Wi-Fi, and boasts a beautiful view over the lake, the resort’s lush gardens, and the pristine 9-hole course. The shower is recently renovated. Resort amenities for our guests: • 5 freshwater resort pools (including swim-up bar) • Poolside drink service at primary pools • Resort shuttle between properties and many resort areas • 11 (waterfront) restaurants & bars • Complimentary beach essentials • Free loungers & palapas (first come, first serve) • Rejuvenating spa • Nine-hole Golf course • E-mountain bicycles, children’s bicycles, and group tours • State-of-the-art oceanfront Fitness & Activity center • Tennis courts • Pickleball courts • Resort Casino • Sea Turtle Club for Resort guests 4-12 years • Additional cleaning service (upon request) • Start-up package • Convenient location • Close to Druif Beach, Eagle Beach, and Manchebo Beach As a guest at Divi Village, you have access to the facilities at ALL Divi Resorts across the island. Please note that Tamarijn Aruba is not included in the standard access. You can access Tamarijn Aruba by purchasing an access card at the front desk. Housekeeping services are also available upon request, offering additional amenities such as extra towels, sheets, blankets, toilet paper, and trash bags to ensure a comfortable stay. Guests can easily arrange this through the front desk. If you’re interested in renting a car during your stay, the Divi front desk can provide you with more information and assistance. Want to take your vacation to the next level? You can upgrade to an all-inclusive package at the front desk for an additional cost, giving you unlimited dining and drinks throughout your stay. Whether you're a couple looking for a romantic retreat or a small family in search of sunshine and adventure, our condo offers a warm, welcoming base to experience the very best of Aruba.

rentals.name: Aruba Islander Residence 2
rentals.notes: Aruba Islander Residence 2 This unit is a bright and stylish studio located on the ground floor within the peaceful Aruba Islander Residences in Oranjestad. Thoughtfully designed with a plush king-size bed, a cozy seating area, a well-equipped kitchen, and a newly installed water heater, this studio offers a comfortable retreat for couples or solo travelers looking to unwind. Guests can also enjoy a brick-built barbecue located next to the pool area, perfect for relaxed outdoor dining and soaking in the island atmosphere. Large windows fill the space with natural light, creating a fresh and relaxing atmosphere from the moment you arrive. Guests also have direct access to the shared pool, perfect for cooling off after a day exploring the island. Beach chairs and a cooler are provided to make your beach days even easier. Set in a quiet residential area, the location offers the ideal balance of tranquility and convenience. Within minutes, you can reach Aruba's most beloved beaches, including Eagle Beach and Palm Beach, famous for their soft white sands and turquoise waters. Nearby supermarkets such as Ling & Sons and Superfood Plaza make stocking up simple, while local bakeries, cafés, and casual dining spots give you a taste of true island living. Oranjestad’s colorful downtown—filled with Dutch-Caribbean charm, shops, and nightlife—is just a short drive away, and nature enthusiasts can easily explore Hooiberg or Arikok National Park for breathtaking views and outdoor adventures. Whether you're here to relax, explore, or enjoy a bit of both, this unit offers a comfortable, modern base.

rentals.name: Coco Cove
rentals.notes: Coco Cove Relax and recharge in our cozy studio, perfect for solo travelers or couples seeking comfort and convenience. This inviting space features a king-size bed for a restful night's sleep and a Smart TV so you can stream your favorite shows during a night in. Wake up to your day in the breakfast area, ideal for enjoying a morning coffee before heading out. The compact kitchenette comes equipped with essentials for light cooking, making it easy to prepare snacks or simple meals. The layout includes a convenient connecting space and ample closet storage, helping you stay organized throughout your stay. The modern bathroom offers everything you need, including a shower, with clean lines and functional design. Whether you're here for work, leisure, or a little of both, this studio has everything you need, all in one place.

rentals.name: Hidden Gem
rentals.notes: Hidden Gem Welcome to your perfect island getaway in the peaceful neighborhood of Noord, Aruba. This colorful and spacious 2-bedroom, 1.5-bathroom apartment is located on the second floor and offers everything you need for a comfortable and relaxing stay. Just a short drive from the high-rise hotel area, popular beaches, restaurants, and nightlife, it’s the ideal home base for exploring the island. Inside, you’ll find a bright living room with a cozy sleeping sofa, perfect for relaxing. There’s a smart TV and a dining area with seating for four, great for shared meals or movie nights. The fully equipped kitchen includes a breakfast bar with three bar stools, making it easy to enjoy casual meals or chat over drinks while cooking. Just off the living area, a private balcony with a small table offers a great spot to enjoy your morning coffee or unwind in the evening breeze. The apartment has two comfortable bedrooms, each with a king-size bed and plenty of closet space. The full bathroom includes two sinks, a shower, a relaxing tub, a bidet, and a toilet. There’s also a half bathroom conveniently located near the living area. Guests will also have access to a private parking space, and the quiet residential location makes it easy to relax while staying close to all the action. Whether you’re traveling as a couple, a family, or with friends, this Noord apartment offers the perfect blend of comfort, style, and convenience for your Aruba vacation.

rentals.name: Lincoln's Lagoon - 3BR Villa
rentals.notes: Lincoln's Lagoon Step into Lincoln’s Lagoon, a charming 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom villa designed for easy living and memorable moments. From the moment you arrive, you’ll notice a beautifully kept garden, secure gated parking, offering both privacy and convenience. The heart of the home is the open-plan kitchen, dining, and living area, thoughtfully arranged so each space flows naturally into the next. The living room opens to a sunroom-style space, perfect for morning coffee or a quiet read. The fully equipped kitchen makes it simple to prepare meals, while the indoor dining area gives you options for enjoying them. The master bedroom features its own en-suite bathroom, while the second bedroom offers a cozy retreat. The third bedroom includes fun and functional bunk beds. Ideal for families with younger children. A separate laundry room adds to the villa’s convenience. Outside, the private pool invites you to cool off, surrounded by the spacious garden that provides plenty of room to relax. In the evenings, gather at the outdoor dining area for leisurely meals under the night sky. Set in a peaceful residential neighborhood, Lincoln’s Lagoon is just minutes from local restaurants, supermarkets, and a gas station. Giving you the best of both tranquility and easy access to amenities. Whether you’re here for quality family time or a getaway with friends, this villa makes every stay feel effortless and inviting.

rentals.name: Sunny Side Villa - 3BR
rentals.notes: Sunny Side Villa This beautifully appointed home features three comfortable bedrooms, three full bathrooms, and a generous living space that brings everyone together. Whether you're lounging by the sparkling private pool, grilling under the sun, or enjoying a quiet coffee on the balcony, this villa is your launchpad for unforgettable memories. Inside, you’ll find a bright and open living room with cozy seating and a large smart TV for movie nights. The fully equipped kitchen includes appliances and bar stools for casual bites, and the adjacent dining area is perfect for meals. The master bedroom features a plush king bed, direct access to a private balcony, and an ensuite bathroom. The second bedroom offers a cozy queen bed, while the third bedroom has two twin beds — perfect for kids or friends. The living room sofa easily converts into a bed. Three bathrooms, one with easy access to the backyard, make freshening up after a swim or day out super convenient. Step outside and discover your private paradise: a sun-drenched pool, a BBQ area for outdoor cooking, a covered dining space, and even your own bar to toast the good times. Nestled in a quiet neighborhood, the villa offers peace and privacy, while being close to local attractions, shops, and beaches. Whether you're planning a family getaway, a couple's retreat, or a friends’ escape, this villa is the perfect place to relax, recharge, and make lasting memories.

rentals.name: Tropical Oasis - Aracari 21
rentals.notes: Tropical Oasis - Aracari 21 Modern 2-BR Condo located in Aracari Residences in Noord, Aruba – Sleeps max 5 pax. Welcome to our modern and inviting condo, located on the third floor of our charming new property. As you step inside, you're greeted by a living room, adorned with stylish furnishings including a sofa bed, and featuring a Smart TV for your entertainment needs. Adjacent to the living room, a cozy balcony awaits, offering a serene space to unwind and soak in the surrounding ambiance. Our fully equipped kitchen offers induction cooking facilities, perfect for whipping up culinary delights. Complete with a convenient bar area, it's ideal for enjoying meals and socializing with friends and family. The master bedroom with a luxurious king-sized bed, Smart TV, and spacious closet space, ensures a restful and comfortable stay. You'll also find an en-suite bathroom, equipped with a refreshing shower, toilet, and sink, providing convenience and privacy. For additional guests or family members, the second bedroom features a queen-sized bed, Smart TV, and offers easy access to a separate bathroom in the hallway, complete with all the necessary amenities. Outside, guests can indulge in relaxation at the communal pool and sitting area, perfect for soaking up the sun or enjoying a refreshing dip. And for those seeking panoramic views and outdoor entertainment, our common rooftop area awaits, boasting two BBQs and seating for dining and social gatherings. Plus, you have access to our on-site gym facilities. Whether you're seeking a tranquil retreat or a vibrant urban escape, our condo offers the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and luxury for your next getaway. Welcome to your home away from home.

rentals.name: Casa al Mare - 3BR Villa
rentals.notes: Casa al Mare Discover the ultimate retreat at our stunning three-bedroom, two-bathroom villa located in the conveniently located Monserat. Designed for relaxation and comfort, this exquisite villa is perfect for families, couples, and friends looking to create unforgettable memories. As you step into the villa, you’ll be greeted by a spacious living room and an open kitchen. The living room, adorned with two couches and a TV, invites you to unwind and enjoy your favorite shows and movies. The open kitchen, fully equipped with modern necessities, features a stylish five-seat bar – perfect for casual dining and entertainment. The master bedroom boasts a sumptuous king-sized bed, TV, ample closet space, and an en-suite bathroom complete with a washing sink, toilet, and a luxurious rainfall shower with hot water. The second (with TV) and third bedroom each offer a cozy queen-sized bed, ensuring everyone has a comfortable and private space. The second bathroom, conveniently located in the hallway, provides easy access for all guests. The highlight of this villa is its magnificent outdoor area. Enclosed by harmonica doors, this space includes a lounge area with a ten-seat dining table and a cozy sitting area. Whether you’re hosting a family dinner or enjoying a quiet evening under the stars, this area is perfect for any occasion. Adjacent to the dining area, you’ll find a charming bar with bar chairs, ideal for mixing cocktails and socializing. The centerpiece of our villa is the stunning outdoor pool, featuring a beautiful fountain that adds a touch of elegance and tranquility. Lounge by the pool, take a refreshing dip or fire up the BBQ for a delightful outdoor meal. Escape the everyday and immerse yourself in the serenity of our Monserat villa. Book your stay today and experience a vacation like no other. Whether you’re seeking relaxation or quality time with loved ones, our villa offers the perfect setting for your dream getaway. Don’t miss out on this exceptional vacation rental. Reserve your dates now and start planning your unforgettable Monserat escape. We look forward to welcoming you!

rentals.name: Mesa Vista
rentals.notes: Mesa Vista 29 Welcome to your dream getaway in the exclusive Tierra del Sol Resort in Aruba. This stunning four-bedroom, three-and-a-half-bathroom villa offers the perfect combination of luxury, comfort, and breathtaking views over the beautifully landscaped 18-hole golf course. From the moment you arrive, you’ll be drawn to the villa’s serene outdoor living spaces. The spacious private swimming pool invites you to cool off under the Caribbean sun. At the same time, the stylish bar area with BBQ and multiple seating areas creates the perfect setting for relaxing afternoons and memorable evenings. Whether you're enjoying a quiet morning coffee or a sunset dinner, the outdoor space is designed for pure enjoyment. Inside, the villa is bright, open, and thoughtfully designed for both relaxation and entertaining. The main living room offers a comfortable seating area with a Smart TV and large patio doors that open directly to the outdoor terrace, creating a seamless indoor-outdoor experience. A second lounge area provides even more space to unwind, also with easy access to the pool area. The dining space flows effortlessly into a fully equipped, spacious kitchen complete with all necessary appliances and a convenient bar, making it ideal for gathering and socializing. On the ground floor, you will find two beautifully appointed bedrooms. The first bedroom features a king-size bed, a TV, and a private en-suite bathroom with a walk-in shower, double sinks, and a toilet. The second bedroom also offers a king-size bed and TV, along with its own en-suite bathroom equipped with a bathtub, sink, and toilet. Down the hall, there is a laundry room with a washer and dryer, as well as a convenient half bathroom. Upstairs, the spacious master bedroom serves as a private retreat, complete with a king-size bed, Smart TV, ample closet space, and access to a balcony overlooking the golf course. The fourth bedroom is ideal for families or additional guests, featuring a queen-size bed along with a single bed. Whether you spend your days lounging by the pool, enjoying the peaceful golf course scenery, or exploring everything Aruba has to offer, this villa provides the perfect setting for an unforgettable stay. Experience the ultimate in island living, where comfort, style, and relaxation come together effortlessly. About Tierra del Sol Resort & Golf Nestled along Aruba’s stunning northwest coastline, Tierra del Sol is the island’s premier gated resort community where luxury, privacy, and natural beauty come together. Set across nearly 600 acres, the resort offers breathtaking panoramic views of the Caribbean Sea, rugged coastline, and Aruba’s unique desert landscape. At the heart of the community lies a spectacular 18-hole championship golf course, consistently ranked among the Caribbean’s most scenic courses. Guests can enjoy access (via day pass) to a range of upscale amenities, including a full-service spa, modern fitness center, tennis courts, and a beautiful resort pool. The clubhouse restaurant and bar offer a relaxed yet refined dining experience with sweeping views. Just minutes away, you’ll find some of Aruba’s most pristine beaches. The lively Palm Beach area, with its restaurants, beach clubs, casinos, and nightlife, is only a short drive away, giving you the perfect balance between tranquility and entertainment. Tierra del Sol is more than a resort; it’s a complete Aruba experience.

rentals.name: The Seahorse Residence
rentals.notes: The Seahorse Residence The Seahorse Residence - 3BR Villa Welcome to The Seahorse Residence, a beautifully designed retreat that captures the peaceful charm of Aruba’s island life. Inspired by the gentle spirit of the seahorse, this home offers the perfect balance of relaxation, comfort, and playful touches, making it ideal for families and groups alike. Nestled in a quiet neighborhood surrounded by nature, the villa is conveniently located just minutes from the airport, supermarkets, and local amenities. Its central location means you’re only a short drive away from both the lively Palm Beach area and the serene shores of Baby Beach, allowing you to explore the best of the island with ease. ☀️ A separate apartment is available for larger groups. It features its own bathroom, kitchenette, and a cozy living area with a futon. The main house sleeps 6 guests, while the apartment can accommodate 2 additional guests, bringing the total capacity to 8. ✨ Please note that an additional fee applies for the apartment. ✨🌴 The main house features three thoughtfully appointed bedrooms. The master suite offers a calm and spacious escape with its private ensuite bathroom and a generous walk-in closet. The front bedroom is bright and welcoming, featuring a large window that fills the room with natural sunlight and offers a beautiful outdoor view. The third bedroom is a favorite among children, with a playful slide and fun play area designed to make their island stay unforgettable. The heart of the home lies in the open-concept living space, where the modern kitchen, dining, and living areas flow seamlessly together. The kitchen is fully equipped with modern appliances, a stylish island, and everything you need to prepare home-cooked meals or entertain guests. From the dining area, large sliding glass doors open completely to the back garden, inviting the fresh island breeze and a lovely view of the pool into your space. This easy indoor-outdoor flow creates the perfect setting for both relaxation and social gatherings. For larger groups, a separate apartment on the property provides extra space and privacy. This cozy unit includes its own bathroom, a small living room with a futon, and a kitchenette with a mini-fridge. The apartment can be booked for an additional fee, ensuring flexibility based on your group’s needs. Outside, you’ll find a private pool area surrounded by lush greenery — a peaceful oasis for sunbathing, swimming, or simply unwinding after a day of exploring the island. The spacious patio area is perfect for enjoying a BBQ under the stars or relaxing with a cool drink in hand as you take in the warm Aruban breeze. The Seahorse Residence combines the comforts of home with the charm of island living. Whether you’re traveling with family, friends, or as a couple seeking a relaxing getaway, this property offers the ideal setting to create lasting memories. Its thoughtful design, family-friendly features, and peaceful location make it a true gem for anyone looking to experience the best of Aruba in comfort and style. Book your stay at The Seahorse Residence and discover the tranquility, convenience, and unique charm that make this home a one-of-a-kind retreat on the island.

rentals.name: Beach in my Backyard - Ocean Front Villa
rentals.notes: Beach in my Backyard Discover Paradise at Beach in My Backyard - Your Ultimate Seaside Retreat Welcome to "Beach in My Backyard," a magnificent beachfront villa that epitomizes the dream of living by the sea. This stunning property promises an escape where every moment feels like a scene from a postcard, set against the backdrop of Aruba's breathtaking coastline. Luxurious Living Space From the moment you step through the front door, the villa opens up into a spacious living room, elegantly furnished with two comfortable couches and a flat-screen TV, creating the perfect sanctuary to unwind after a day of exploration and sun. A convenient guest toilet is available for both residents and visitors, ensuring comfort and convenience at every turn. Culinary Haven with Ocean Views At the heart of this tropical oasis is the expansive dining area, complete with a large table and eight chairs, inviting guests to gather for memorable meals. The open-concept, fully equipped kitchen is a chef's delight, offering not just the tools to create delicious cuisine but also uninterrupted views of the azure ocean beyond, making every cooking experience a pleasure. Serene Bedrooms The master bedroom is a tranquil retreat, featuring a king-sized bed, patio doors that open directly to the backyard, a walk-in closet, and an ensuite bathroom equipped with modern amenities. Three additional bedrooms—one with a queen-sized bed and the other two with king-sized beds—ensure that every guest finds their perfect spot to rest and rejuvenate. A well-appointed hallway bathroom, complete with essential facilities, serves these rooms, guaranteeing comfort and privacy for all. Indoor-Outdoor Bliss True to the spirit of island living, the kitchen leads to a backyard oasis where a cozy sitting area and BBQ await, setting the stage for unforgettable al fresco dining under the stars. The lush garden extends to a deck with mesmerizing ocean views, offering a peaceful haven for relaxation and contemplation. Convenience and Proximity to Nature With a carport for two vehicles, the villa emphasizes convenience, ensuring ease of exploration for guests. Moreover, the proximity to the famous Mangel Halto Beach, just a 3-minute stroll away, invites endless opportunities for seaside adventures, snorkeling, and soaking up the sun on pristine sands. Your Seaside Escape Awaits Booking "Beach in My Backyard" opens the door to a world of luxury, tranquility, and natural beauty. Here, every day is an invitation to indulge in seaside bliss and embrace the laid-back elegance of Aruba. Your paradise awaits at this beachfront villa, where every detail is curated for your ultimate comfort and enjoyment. Note : At this time, hot water is only available in the master bathroom.

rentals.name: Mango Gardens - Condo in Oranjestad
rentals.notes: Mango Gardens Welcome to Mango Gardens 🥭, a cozy and inviting studio tucked away in a peaceful condo complex just minutes from Oranjestad. Named after the beautiful mango tree beside the porch, this space offers a relaxed island feel and a true sense of being on vacation the moment you arrive. Guests can enjoy a shared, beautifully maintained pool, perfect for starting your morning with a refreshing swim or unwinding after a day of exploring Aruba. The unit is ideal for solo travelers or couples looking for comfort and convenience. Inside, you’ll find a comfortable king-size bed, a small sofa for relaxing, and a spacious closet for all your essentials. The fully equipped kitchen makes it easy to prepare meals, and the intimate dining area for two is perfect for enjoying breakfast or a quiet dinner in. The location is perfect for guests who want to be close to everything, while still enjoying a peaceful place to unwind. You’re just minutes from Oranjestad, where you’ll find local restaurants, shopping malls, and lively streets full of character. The popular high-rise hotel area and beaches are only about a 10-minute drive away. Whether you’re visiting Aruba to relax, explore, or a bit of both, Mango Gardens offers a comfortable and charming home base for your island getaway.

rentals.name: Paradera Breeze
rentals.notes: Paradera Breeze Welcome to Paradera Breeze, your private tropical escape designed for laid-back island living. This charming 2-bedroom home is located in the quiet neighborhood of Paradera, just a 15-minute drive from Aruba’s high-rise area, beaches, restaurants, and nightlife. Inside, the home feels light, airy, and inviting, with an open living space that flows effortlessly into a fully equipped kitchen — perfect for slow mornings and easy evenings. Both bedrooms offer comfortable sleeping arrangements, ideal for a small family or couples traveling together. Step outside and the real vacation begins. The spacious garden is your personal oasis, featuring a beautiful private pool, lush tropical surroundings, and an outdoor dining area made for long meals, laughter, and warm island nights. Whether you’re enjoying a morning swim, an afternoon under the sun, or dinner beneath the stars, Paradera Breeze delivers true tropical-vibe relaxation. Peaceful and perfectly located, Paradera Breeze is the kind of place where days slow down, and memories are made.

rentals.name: Butterfly Gardens - Condo
rentals.notes: Butterfly Gardens Discover Butterfly Gardens, a stylish studio located on the second floor of the Aruba Islander Residences, perfect for travelers seeking both comfort and convenience. This thoughtfully designed unit features a modern interior, an open layout, and a fully equipped kitchen with all the appliances you need to prepare meals during your stay. Natural light fills the space through large windows, and the private balcony is ideal for enjoying your morning coffee, an afternoon drink, or simply taking in the calm surroundings. Step outside and find a beautifully maintained garden where loungers invite you to relax, soak up the sun, or enjoy a quiet moment in the shade. The shared pool adds another layer of enjoyment, perfect for cooling off after a day exploring Aruba’s beaches or city sights. Located in a peaceful yet accessible area of Oranjestad, Butterfly Gardens is just minutes from supermarkets, restaurants, and Aruba’s most famous beaches. The vibrant downtown area is also within easy reach, offering shops, cafés, and cultural experiences. Whether you’re here to unwind, explore, or both, this condo provides a comfortable base that combines relaxation, convenience, and the opportunity to experience the best of the island. (Please note: the unit currently does not have a water heater.)

rentals.name: Casa Afour
rentals.notes: Casa Afour Welcome to Casa Afour: An Opulent Escape in the Heart of Oranjestad Immerse yourself in luxury at Casa Afour, an exquisite villa offering an unparalleled vacation experience in Aruba. This stunning property, nestled in the vibrant heart of Oranjestad, combines modern elegance with the pinnacle of comfort, promising a lavish retreat for those seeking an opulent getaway. Elegant Interiors and Luxurious Comfort Upon entering the villa, the expansive living room unfolds in a display of chic décor and sophisticated charm. The space is anchored by a large dining table for eight, inviting shared meals and unforgettable gatherings. Relax on the plush L-shaped sofa, perfect for movie nights on the smart TV, with sliding doors that reveal serene sitting areas and direct access to the beautiful outdoors. The gourmet kitchen is a culinary dream, equipped with high-end appliances, including a built-in oven, microwave, dishwasher, and a large fridge. It’s a haven for those who love to cook and entertain. Sumptuous Sleeping Quarters The master bedroom is a sanctuary of luxury, featuring a king-sized bed, a cozy sitting area, and a large TV. The en-suite bathroom offers a spa-like experience with a soothing bath, a spacious dual-head shower, double sinks, and a separate toilet, complemented by a colossal walk-in closet. Two additional bedrooms provide queen-sized beds, individual TVs, ample closet space, and workspaces, with one offering direct outdoor access. A well-appointed hallway bathroom serves these rooms, ensuring convenience for all guests. Private Outdoor Paradise The villa’s outdoor area is a true paradise, featuring a large, covered patio with a dining table for 10 and an L-shaped bench overlooking the pool. The highlight is the expansive pool area, complete with a hot tub, outdoor shower, toilet, and an inviting bar area with stools, a BBQ, wine cooler, and TV for memorable evenings. Secluded Studio and Additional Bedroom For guests seeking extra privacy, an upstairs studio with a king-sized bed, a pull-out bed, and an en-suite bathroom offers a secluded retreat. Additionally, a cozy downstairs bedroom adjacent to the pool provides a full-sized bed and en-suite facilities. Unbeatable Location Casa Afour is ideally situated just a short stroll from Oranjestad’s beach, restaurants, bars, shops, a casino, and a cinema, placing the best of Aruba’s entertainment and leisure activities at your doorstep. Experience the Ultimate in Luxury and Convenience Casa Afour invites you to experience the perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and convenience for an unforgettable escape in Aruba. Book your stay at this magnificent villa and step into a world where relaxation meets excitement, and every moment is a treasure.

Unlike the busier parts of Aruba, Savaneta offers a relaxed and authentic lifestyle, while still being within easy reach of Oranjestad and other central areas of the island.

rentals.name: CASA Magnificent House + Apt
rentals.notes: Welcome to this exquisite 5-bedroom retreat in the heart of Aruba, where unparalleled luxury seamlessly blends with ultimate comfort. This exceptional property consists of a stunning 4-bedroom main residence paired with a separate 1-bedroom apartment, offering an ideal layout for both private living and hosting guests. Featuring two private pools, two fully-equipped kitchens, three elegant bathrooms, and two spacious living rooms, this home provides the perfect combination of functionality and opulence.

rentals.name: CASA Traill
rentals.notes: Welcome to Your Luxurious Retreat in Tierra del Sol, Aruba!Discover an elegant 4-bedroom, 4.5-bathroom villa in the stunning Tierra del Sol Community, thoughtfully decorated. This exquisite home offers modern amenities in a serene, private setting, perfect for a peaceful getaway or a fun family vacation. Create unforgettable memories in this beautiful space.- Stylish DesignAs you step through the entrance, you will be welcomed by natural light and chic finishes. The spacious, open-plan design combines contemporary elegance with cozy warmth, setting the tone for your stay. The kitchen, featuring a big island with wine fridges, beautiful cabinetry, and stainless steel appliances, is a culinary haven for your cooking adventures.-Relaxation and Entertainment SpacesThe living room is designed for both comfort and entertainment. Sink into the sofa's while enjoying your favorite shows on the large flat-screen TV. Families will love the theatre on the second floor for fun for all ages during movie nights or your the match of your favorite sports team.- Spacious and Inviting BedroomsEach of the four bedrooms offers its own unique charm, providing comfort and privacy. The master suite features a king-sized bed and an airconditioned spa-like ensuite bathroom, creating a peaceful retreat after a day of adventure. Ample space allows you to unpack and unwind in style.- Outdoor Tropical OasisStep outside to experience your own tropical paradise. Relax by the private pool under the Caribbean sun or enjoy a refreshing evening swim. The spacious porch is perfect for lounging, and the outdoor grill sets the stage for memorable barbecues.- Prime Location in Tierra del SolSituated in the prestigious Tierra del Sol Golf Community, this villa offers complete privacy while being just minutes away from some of Aruba’s most stunning beaches, including the famous Palm Beach. Enjoy the tranquility of the neighborhood alongside easy access to local attractions.- Nearby Attractions and ActivitiesBeyond the peaceful surroundings, you’ll find pristine white sands and inviting waters just a short drive away. For the adventurous traveler, Arashi Beach and the nearby National Park provide unforgettable experiences in nature.The popular "Palm Beach strip' with a lot of restaurants and shops is a short 5 minute drive from your doorstep.- Plan Your Ideal GetawayWhether you’re seeking a quiet getaway or an action-packed vacation with friends or family, this elegant 4 bedroom home in Tierra del Sol is the perfect choice. Book your stay today and enjoy all that Aruba has to offer, from its beautiful beaches to the luxury and comfort of this stunning villa.We do recommend renting a vehicle during your stay, we would be happy to assist you with this.

rentals.name: Seroe Colorado – 3-Bedroom 2-Bath Villa
rentals.notes: With Balcony and Extraordinary Views – Sleeps 6 Guests Minutes to Baby Beach, Rodgers Beach, & Kite-Surf Mecca Boca Grandi! Enjoy luxury & privacy in our 3 bedroom, 2 bath beach bungalow with incredible outdoor spaces for less than most hotel rooms! New, wonderful managers and many updates in 2022 make it easy to soak up the sunrise or sunset on TWO spacious balconies AND a patio. Relax in amazing peace and solitude, or it’s a short jaunt to San Nicolas, the airport, and the rest of the island! Read More The space You’ll park your car in the off-street parking spots, and enter the house through the front porch entry. Immediately, you’ll be in the spacious great room, that connects directly to the kitchen and is open to the veranda via the two double doors, which also doubles the size of the area. While preparing your food in the kitchen, you’ll be able to save money and still hang out with family! You’ll find the three bedrooms down the hall. The Orange Room with a day bed and pull-out bed, and at the end of the hall the peaceful Blue Room with steps down to a queen bed and built-ins share the in-hall bathroom. Also at the end of the hall, you have the Master bedroom, with its beautiful lofted ceiling, King bed, and en-suite bathroom. EVERY ROOM has its own mini-split AC unit so you can all relax at your cool and comfortable preference! Upstairs, you’ll find a secret alcove that boasts another twin bed/play area and access to two balconies–one facing east and one west with plenty of space for several people to enjoy the ocean view and sip cocktails! It’s truly a magical space, with so much to explore around it as you are immediately near local viewing spots, beaches, more local restaurants, and even caves! You may wake up with the island’s donkeys or goats munching on the yard foliage, or be the first people at Baby Beach! But if you wish to head back to town and remind yourself of the rest Aruba has to offer, it’s still quite easy to do! Guest access You’ll have access to the entire house, except for two owner’s closets and the owner’s storage carport. Other things to note The house has a constant breeze, so most days and nights it’s so fun to experience the unique ability to leave “windows and doors open” and not require AC. Most people do use the AC to sleep, but it’s a wonderful way to enjoy the peace directly! The water is drinkable, but many prefer to have bottled water or just drink the local beer, Balashi.

A very spacious kitchen was constructed and added to the apartment to ensure you have everything you might need to enjoy your stay for any length of time. The bathrooms are very modern and give you a feeling of extravagance. The furniture is all solid wood with most of it being imported from Bali, Indonesia! There is also a beautiful patio for you to sit and enjoy the cool Aruban Tradewinds while listening to the birds and admiring the beautiful nature that Kamay Hideout has to offer! Guest access There is ample parking at the front entrance and we always recommend renting a car but for those who already know the island and are really only looking to relax and get away from it all then Kamay Hideout is right for you! You are a short walk from the neighborhood grocery store and taxis can easily be arranged! The price listed does not include the final cleaning fee.337

Fully fenced and very private, the villa is well-located & offers everything you will need for a peaceful vacation. Esmeralda is located only a 2-minute drive to Malmok/Arashi and the Marriott/Ritz beaches, but it is a resort in itself because of its pretty pool area located in the center of the property. Special to this property is a wraparound covered patio and gazebo, so plenty of shade if needed. Its newest feature is its upper deck to take in the sunsets and even nicer sea views of the Malmok coast. Located at the end of a cul de sac, this villa is tranquil and relaxing. Guests enjoy the beautiful views & the privacy! price per night: USD$275.= / AWG.490.= low season price: $1,925 p.w. high season rate: $2,700 p.w.

It is divided into three self-sufficient independent units. Each has an exceptionally large kitchen with top-of-the-line accouterments, full-size refrigerators and stoves, microwaves, and all linens, towels, (including bath towels) China, silverware, and cooking utensils are included. You only need to buy your groceries. There is a secure parking lot off the street and security cameras, a laundry room with a washer and dryer set up in a community area, and safety gates on the second floor for families with young children. Smaller dogs are welcome, for those who wish to feel at home. Master bedrooms all have private baths, along with additional baths shared by the junior bedrooms. Each unit has a business center for setting up a laptop, as well as large plasma screen TVs. The pool deck includes a waterfall, gazebo, shower, and barbecue for outdoor dining. The brand-new facility is located in an upscale neighborhood in the heart of the island, for an authentic taste of the fantasy tropical life. You can feel like you are part of the community while being only minutes away from some of Aruba’s most gorgeous, secluded beaches, supermarkets, excellent dining, and favorite vacation activities. This beautiful house with a private pool, terraces overlooking the entire island, and spacious rooms offer every amenity while allowing you to be totally in control of your vacation experience. Your every desire for an ideal vacation home has been anticipated and is provided. Located at a height, it offers privacy but convenience, and tranquil surroundings away from the hustle and bustle of the busy tourist scene, with breathtaking vistas from the terraces.

rentals.name: Seroe Colorado – Stunning 3-Bedroom Villa with Private Pool

This elegant 3-bedroom home, almost 100 years old, offers a unique blend of timeless charm and modern luxury. Once the residence of Lago Oil Company’s employees and managers, today’s guests can enjoy 3 bedrooms and 2 1/2 baths, a spacious living and dining area, a fully-equipped kitchen, a workspace, and a sparkling pool. Famous Baby Beach is just a 10-minute stroll away. Experience the rich legacy and vibrant beauty of Aruba in this distinctive retreat. Book your stay today! You’ll be just minutes away from the beach, vibrant Aruba nightlife, and top-notch restaurants. With convenient parking and pet-friendly accommodations, it’s perfect for families and friends alike. Enjoy the luxury and comfort you deserve in our exquisite vacation home! *The weekly rate does not include the final cleaning fee. *Rates vary depending on the season.

rentals.name: Sunny Escape Near Baby Beach – Modern 2BR Apartment in San Nicolas
rentals.notes: Experience the relaxed charm of Aruba’s southern coast at Sunny Escape, a newly built and beautifully renovated 2-bedroom apartment in the heart of San Nicolas. Perfectly located just a 10-minute drive from the world-famous Baby Beach and the new Secrets Resort, this stylish retreat is ideal for couples, families, and friends looking to enjoy a more authentic side of Aruba. Step inside and feel right at home in a bright, modern space designed for comfort and convenience. The apartment features two air-conditioned bedrooms, a fully equipped kitchen, a cozy living area, high-speed Wi-Fi, and smart TVs—everything you need for a relaxing and carefree stay. Start your mornings with coffee in the comfort of your apartment, spend your days exploring Aruba’s stunning southern beaches, and return to unwind after a day of adventure. You’ll be within walking distance of local restaurants, cafés, and nightlife, including popular favorites such as Onelis Caribbean Kitchen and Cultra Café. San Nicolas is known for its vibrant street art, cultural attractions, and beautiful coastline, offering a unique blend of relaxation, local flavor, and island adventure. Highlights Newly built and stylishly renovated apartment 2 comfortable air-conditioned bedrooms Fully equipped kitchen Cozy living and dining area High-speed Wi-Fi and smart TVs Walking distance to restaurants, cafés, and nightlife Just 10 minutes from Baby Beach and Rodgers Beach Close to the new Secrets Resort Convenient location for exploring San Nicolas’ art and cultural scene Additional Information Need a rental car during your stay? Let us know, and we’ll be happy to assist with arranging one to make your Aruba vacation even more convenient.

The properties are completely furnished and have two and a half bathrooms for added convenience. Enjoy the fully furnished patio with a barbeque grill for late-night dinners and drinks in the warm Aruban air. M

(December 20 – January 6) $850 per night

rentals.name: Sunset Vista Villa
rentals.notes: Bring the whole family to this very private villa with incredible, unobstructed sunset views, a large pool and jacuzzi, and expansive areas for backyard enjoyment. The space Located in Ruby, one of Aruba’s upscale neighborhoods, this lovely Villa is only a 4-minute drive to the Ritz Carlton and Marriott Hotels, Casinos, and beaches, and an additional 1-minute drive to multiple resorts, hotels, shopping, and world-class dining in Palm Beach. Eagle Beach, one of the top two-rated beaches in the world, is a mere 10 minutes away. Unwind in the elevated jacuzzi while listening to the calm sound of the waterfall as it cascades to the pool below. A rare location on the Salina with expansive views of open blue skies and peek-a-views of the sea. Gaze upon the windsurfers’ sails and passing sailboats in the distance. Relax and sip a cool drink under the shade of the large palapa and coconut trees. In late fall, winter, and early spring seasons, the Salina fills with water, affording a lakeside location. In late spring, summer, and early fall, the Salina is sandy. Ruby Villa sleeps 10 adults comfortably. There is air conditioning throughout the house and ceiling fans in every room, including 2 large fans in the vaulted ceiling of the large outdoor patio. The spacious master bedroom overlooks the beautiful patio and pool with a king-size bed and double vanity sinks in the private bathroom. Enjoy a 65-inch Smart TV for your entertainment. The 2nd spacious master bedroom affords a king-size bed and double vanity sinks in the private bathroom. Located on the opposite side of the main house are 2 bedrooms, each with a queen-size bed, with 1 attached bathroom as well as a separate entrance to the patio and pool. An additional 5th bedroom with a full-size bed and attached bathroom and shower is located off the pool and patio area with a private entrance. The expansive living room with vaulted ceiling faces the patio and stunning Salina views, equipped with a 75-inch Smart TV for your enjoyment. You can access your TV applications such as Netflix, Prime, Hulu, YouTube, etc., as well as free live TV. Enjoy a roomy kitchen fully equipped for your cooking desires that connects to the dining room. The kitchen has a direct entrance to the patio and pool area for easy access and patio serving with spacious dining for 10, as well as for breakfast or evening relaxing under the large palapa. An outdoor grill is also available. Secure Internet is available throughout the property. All 5 bedrooms have 2 bedside tables with electrical charger capabilities, with up to 8 AC outlets, 3 USB chargers, and 1 USB-C port for all your electronic devices. The house is equipped with a full security system. Ruby Sunset Villa is private and secure, and provides some of the best sunset views on the island.

Outside, you’ll explore ocean views, sunset vistas, picture-perfect manicured grounds, and a private spa-worthy pool with an ever-flowing fountain. Meanwhile, the interior is bedecked with fine furnishings and beach-chic décor, all designed to give you the peaceful island vacation that you and your family deserve. Sleek and inviting, the kitchen offers an abundance of space to help with meal prep and entertaining. Showcasing a series of custom cabinets, gorgeous countertops, and an array of useful appliances, there is nothing this kitchen can provide. The tall ceilings, tiled flooring, and a pair of wood-framed windows permit this room to breathe, giving it a sense of calm and comfort. Conveniently located just a few feet away, sits a rustic super table staged with six handsome dining chairs. Once again, the towering ceilings offer a sense of grandeur, allowing this space to fit any occasion. Whether you’re planning a family reunion or simply looking to hold a romantic dinner for two, this setting aims to please.

rentals.name: On the Beach Two-Villa Estate
rentals.notes: 3 Bedrooms; 2 Villas; 1 Magical Experience Villa Sleep: 10 Bedrooms: 3 Bathrooms: 2 Min Stay: 1 – 7 nights No pets allowed Read More Step out of your bedroom right onto your very own patio on a white sandy beach, Savaneta’s most romantic hideaway. This secure gated property is one of 39 homes in Aruba built right on the water (not across the street from the beach). There are two villas on the property. This listing allows you to rent both. For info on renting any individual villa, click ‘More Details’ and scroll to the bottom of the “About the Property’ section. Our one-bedroom villa is ideal for a romantic couple or up to three people with a cot. It offers a queen-size bed, kitchen, renovated modern bathroom with warm water shower, outdoor bar, and Zen seating area under patio cover overlooking a palm garden and the ocean. Our two-bedroom villa boasts a master bedroom with a king-sized bed, and a second bedroom with one full/ double bed, and one twin(single) bed which can be put together for a super-king size bed. Cots can be provided upon request. The kitchenette is perfect for light meal preparation. It has a new full-size refrigerator, a microwave oven, a toaster oven, a coffee brewing machine, an electric stove, and of course, a blender for those spectacular sunset drinks. Our living room is perfect for taking a breezy break from the hot sun and our modern bathroom with a large walk-in shower has just been upgraded to offer warm water, which is considered special in Aruba. Outdoor Patio and Beach: * Covered patio Zen decorated living space * Unique outdoor kitchen area with sink in a marble mosaic countertop, and charcoal Bar-B-Q * Outdoor patio seating, including dining tables and chairs, chaise lounges, Adirondack chairs, and folding, portable beach chairs The villas are perfect for 1, 2, or 3 romantic couples seeking a connection with nature in all of its beauty. Fishing & Boating: Fishing is available right off of the dock near our villa but if you want a real adventure, you can charter a small boat from the fishermen who dock by the restaurants down the street (Zeerover), or head to the port to charter a fully-equipped deep sea fishing boat or even a beautiful sailboat to take you snorkeling around the island, catch the sunset, and enjoy the views. Scuba & Snorkeling: Scuba diving is recommended right off our beach. Put on your tank and swim directly to a picturesque 100-foot wall reef teeming with colorful fish and a family of turtles. It is also one of the best snorkeling sites in the Caribbean. Experienced English-speaking divemasters and are a phone call away, available for private dives right off our beach or elsewhere on the island. Restaurants: Two of Aruba’s most exceptional restaurants are within walking distance along our stretch of beach. One is Zeerover, the local’s fishing station serving the “catch of the day.” It provides fresh seafood to the restaurants in Aruba and serves the ‘catch of the morning’ for lunch or sunset-viewing in a truly local and down-to-Earth wharf setting. When feeling adventurous, there is an opportunity to charter a fishing excursion there as well. The other is the romantic Flying Fishbone where you can sit at a transporting white-tablecloth restaurateur and have a Michelin-worthy meal with your feet in the ocean. Also nearby are the restaurants Arubaville, Barefoot, and Marina Pirata which require a short drive. There are also quite a few delicious local restaurants in the neighborhood. Groceries: There is a local supermarket a 5-minute walk away and several others within short driving distance. Away from the crowds of hotel bustle, in a paradise garden right on the beach, among the chirping of birds and parrots, and in the constant rhythm of the surf. Share your lunch with hummingbirds in the garden or with pelicans on the beach. Escape to Robinson Crusoe’s world! The house is in the fishing village of Savaneta, an ancient port city and the old capital of Aruba. It is situated halfway between Oranjestad and Baby beach, about a 7 minutes’ drive from the airport.

rentals.name: Marriott Surf Club Studio For Rent
rentals.notes: Looking for a cozy and comfortable place to stay while on vacation? Check out our studio at the Marriott Surf Club! With room to sleep up to 4 guests, this studio is perfect for a small family or group of friends. Enjoy all the amenities of the Surf Club, including a beautiful pool and beach access. Book your stay today and experience the best of Aruba!

rentals.name: Savaneta – Beachfront 1-Bedroom Apartment
rentals.notes: Welcome to your beachfront paradise! This stunning one-bedroom, one-bathroom apartment is ideally located right on the beach, offering unbeatable sunset views from your outdoor seating area. With direct beach access, you can spend your days lounging in the sun or taking a relaxing stroll along the shore. Plus, the convenience of a local supermarket is just a 5-minute walk away, along with several others within a short driving distance.

rentals.name: Nature’s Haven: Your Ideal Villa for Retreats, Bird Watching & Island Adventures
rentals.notes: A Tranquil Country Retreat Surrounded by Nature Step into a one-of-a-kind sanctuary that beautifully blends the charm of an old-fashioned country home with thoughtful modern touches. Nestled in a truly unique natural setting, this serene property offers an atmosphere like no other on the island, making it a dream for nature lovers, bird watchers, and those seeking a peaceful environment for yoga, meditation, QiGong, Tai Chi, breathwork, or intimate spiritual retreats. Read More The upper level, with its private entrance, features a spacious master suite with soaring 10-foot ceilings and breathtaking distant ocean and sunset views. This level includes a king bed in the master bedroom, a cozy office with a queen-size wall bed, and a planned queen-size leather sleeper sofa in the reading nook, comfortably sleeping up to six guests. An outdoor kitchen and dining area on the expansive patio provides the perfect backdrop for al fresco meals and tranquil evenings. Please note that while accommodating, the sleeping arrangements on this level share one bathroom and do not offer full privacy. The main level offers three well-appointed bedrooms: two with queen beds and one with two full-size beds, along with two bathrooms featuring showers. The air-conditioned sunken living room will include a luxurious queen-size sleeper sofa, allowing this level to sleep up to eight guests. The home can sleep up to 14 guests across both levels, making it ideal for extended families, group retreats, or gatherings seeking a blend of comfort and connection with nature. Let this soulful retreat embrace you with its peaceful energy and inspiring surroundings.

rentals.name: Noord – 3-Bedroom Villa with Pool – Sleeps 8 Guests
rentals.notes: This stylish 3 Bdr Villa – with an outside Pool is perfectly spacious for family and group trips! If you want to feel the very essence of Aruba within the bright sun, refreshing water, and cool breeze….Casa Blanca is the place to enjoy your Island Getaway! Make yourself at home in this fabulous 3-bedroom Noord villa retreat. With 2 king beds and 2 full beds, this amazing property offers AC, WiFi, and a washing machine. The 3 bathrooms come equipped with showers and hair dryers. We think our place will help you experience everything Noord has to offer.365

rentals.name: Steps to Malmok Beach – Luxury Grand Sea View Villa with Oversized Pool, Comfy Gazebo, Extra Outdoor Kitchen and 6000 Square Feet of Living Space
rentals.notes: Enjoy Malmok, Aruba’s finest beach neighborhood! Situated among mansions and other grand villas, you will find our spacious, Seaview, walk-to-the-beach Villa Bella Mare, Aruba’s most completely appointed rental villa! Malmok is Aruba’s most luxurious neighborhood. It’s quiet and exclusively residential, but only 3 minutes to Palm Beach and all the action! When we describe Villa Bella Mare as being steps from the beach, we mean that it is only a 1-minute walk to Boca Catalina Beach, a pristine, natural beach that is an island favorite. Bring your snorkel, mask, and perhaps fins for a crystal-clear snorkeling experience with plenty of fish and things to see. The sea there is the calmest of any other beach cove on the island! Swim out to the Antilla, a popular dive wreck where many of the snorkel cruises stop to snorkel. Our spacious, luxury villa features 500 m2 or 6000 ft.2 of living space on almost half an acre of land, the largest lot in the neighborhood, plus an oversized pool, a large comfy gazebo with wet bar and spacious pool deck, as well as BBQ grills. There are 3 good-sized bedrooms with en-suite bathrooms, 2 of which are huge master suites, one upstairs with a nice sea view, and one downstairs with patio doors leading directly to the pool area. The 3rd bedroom is also downstairs. The master suite downstairs has a king and a queen bed. Sleeps 4. This lovely airy room has direct access to the pool via patio doors. The master suite upstairs has a sea view, a split-king memory foam motion bed, and a single bed – sleeps 3. The 3rd bedroom has a double bed that sleeps 2. All bedrooms have their own private baths with a walk-in shower. The home theater room is the living room. Enjoy the 85” top-tier TV and the upright piano. Half of the VERY comfortable L-shaped sofa can become a pull-out queen bed. Sleeps 2. There is a half bath available for any guests sleeping in this room. Description of bedrooms & bed sizes: Upstairs master suite with sea view: 1 split king motion bed with memory foam mattresses and 1 single bed – sleeps 3. Enjoy the spa tub/shower and extra-long bathroom vanity with his & hers basins, plus a separate area with toilet & bidet. Downstairs master suite with patio doors to the pool area: 1 king bed, 1 queen bed – sleeps 4 (or more with children), walk-in closet, hallway with extra storage, extra-long vanity in bathroom with his & hers basins, large walk-in or roll-in shower plus separate tub/jacuzzi, and a separate room with toilet & bidet. Third bedroom: 1 double (full) bed, spacious closet & drawers, ensuite bathroom with walk-in shower. There is also a state-of-the-art half bath for guests on the ground floor as well, a sea-view dining room, a comfortable living room with an upright piano, an oversized state-of-the-art indoor island Euro-kitchen, a full outdoor kitchen, perfect for entertaining, BBQ, plenty of pool lounges, several beach chairs to take to the beach, pool floats, and beach toys. Enjoy the Bocce court at the back of the pool, complete with 2 sets of bocce balls. This is a perfect way to relax – playing a game of bocce with your friends and family. The living room sleeps 2 on the queen sleeper sofa. The villa sleeps a total of 11 people, 9 in beds and 2 more in the living room. Low season: Spring starting 8 days after Easter Sunday & fall until Dec. 20: $3000 per week Summer season: Memorial Day weekend, June, July, August, until the Tuesday after U.S. Labor Day (first Monday in September): $3700 per week Winter season: January 6 until 8 days after Easter: $4,200 per week Ultra-high season Xmas week: Dec. 21 – 26: $7,400 per week Ultra-high season New Year’s week: Dec. 26 – Jan. 6: $8,100 per week

rentals.name: Noord – Hilltop Mansion with Pool, Views & Lush Garden
rentals.notes: Situated on nearly three acres atop a hill with a stunning view of the ocean including Eagle and Palm Beach, Villa Tropical is described by many who know Aruba as one of the finest homes on the island. The custom natural rock pool is unique to the island and is surrounded by an amazing fully mature and expansive garden and natural rock waterfall. Read More Enjoy the day sunbathing by the pool on the comfortable teak lounge furniture. Listen to the tropical birds while you admire the fantastic ocean sunsets from the infinity hot tub while friends play volleyball or from the large palapa gazebo while you and your family enjoy an evening meal. Sleep comfortably in 5 fully airconditioned bedrooms. Villa Tropical is very private and on a very large parcel of land which also includes a 150-fruit tree orchard. The trade winds blow unencumbered through the whole home if you desire. In addition to the amenities listed below, daily housekeeping can be arranged at an additional cost, There is a $250.00 cleaning fee per week that will include one visit during your stay and clean up when you leave the island. Come have fun on Aruba and reserve your stay on the island at Villa Tropical. You will be very glad that you did. Amenities • Air Conditioning • Washer/Dryer • Linens provided: bath, pool, & beach towels; beach blankets • Two-car garage • Off-street parking for 10 or more cars • Parking for RV/boat/trailer Beds • Queen Bed (4) • King Bed in the master bedroom Entertainment • Cable/Satellite TV (4) • DVD • Video Library • Video Game Console • Video Games • CD Player • Stereo System • Music Library • Private Hot Tub • Private Pool • Volleyball Court Kitchen • Full Kitchen: Full gourmet kitchen • Cooking utensils provided: grapefruit spoons, juicer, Cuisinart • Refrigerator (2) • Dishwasher • Microwave • Catering available Outdoor Features • Gas/Electric BBQ Grill • Charcoal BBQ Grill • Deck/Patio • Lanai • Gazebo View/Location • Ocean View • Mountain View: you can see the Hoiberg from the front door • New Year’s Eve fireworks are out of this world • Monument View Communications • Telephone • Cell Phone: basic cell phone available for guest use • Computer • Broadband Internet • WiFi (Wireless Internet) Other Amenities • Massage Table & Spa Services • Gourmet Kitchen, Turtles • Backyard has 125 tree fruit orchard Suitability • No Pets Allowed • Handicapped Accessible: it is a ranch home • Wheelchair Accessible: it is a ranch home with an open floor plan • Kid Friendly: there is so much room to run around • Smoking is Not Allowed

Read More From the moment you arrive, you are welcomed by your own private outdoor oasis. The sparkling pool, complete with a gentle fountain, is surrounded by sun loungers where you can fully enjoy the tropical sunshine. The shaded lounge area and outdoor dining space with BBQ create the perfect setting for long, relaxing evenings. Inside, the villa features a spacious and stylish layout with modern finishes and elegant décor. The open-concept living area is designed for both comfort and entertaining, seamlessly connecting indoor and outdoor living. The villa accommodates up to 6 guests: Master bedroom with king bed and private bathroom Second bedroom with king bed and private bathroom Third bedroom with queen bed Additional features include air conditioning, WiFi, free parking, and all the essentials for a comfortable stay. This is the perfect Tierra del Sol villa in Aruba for those looking for luxury, privacy, and a true island lifestyle experience. 194

rentals.name: Luxury Tropical Villa with Private Pool | Minutes from Aruba’s Best Beaches & Dining
rentals.notes: This villa will take your tropical vacation to a whole new level! Step inside a cozy abode, filled with high ceilings, fine furnishings, and breathtaking Aruban architecture. Beautifully appointed with top-of-the-line bathrooms, sleeping quarters, kitchen, outdoor pool, and private driveway – this restful hidden gem is located only 3 minutes from award-winning restaurants, boutiques, beaches, and more! You don’t need to go out to feel like you’ve having a night on the town. Turn an ordinary dinner into a special occasion by dining in the banquet room. Here, you will uncover a chic farmhouse supper table staged with four high-backed chairs dressed in rustic suede, as romantic pendant light hangs high above to set the mood for any occasion. Meanwhile, vibrant three-piece artwork hangs proudly upon the wall, transforming this room into a five-star restaurant. Traveling with a large party? Don’t worry, there is plenty of additional seating nearby! Whether you’re preparing a familiar favorite or whipping up a fresh batch of margaritas, the kitchen has you covered. Well stocked and staged to perfection, this galley provides a bevy of stainless-steel appliances, spacious pristine white cabinetry, a deluxe range hood, and luxurious half-wall that the whole family will love! The family room is cozy and inviting while providing you with all the essentials, including a comfy couch, trendy coffee table, woven guest seating, wall-mounted flat-screen television, and more! The tropical influence and subtle pops of color throughout make this the perfect room for relaxing and living life on “island time!” A spacious boudoir, Bedroom #1 displays a massive king size bed, two matching end tables, and a California closet, as well as a spa-inspired en suite with a glass walk-in show and soaker tub. In addition, you’ll uncover slated tiling and floating vanity, separated by a fashionable stone textured half-wall with a small box window that allows for glowing natural sunlight. Bedroom #2 takes on an Island-vibe, offering an antique king size bed four post bed, matching nightstands, ornate secretary, and extra-wide dresser upon a pristine white wall backdrop. Complete with a rose private en suite with both a bathroom and shower. Bedroom #3 features a queen size bed, wood shuttered window, nightstand, and cubby to help you keep your room neat and tidy, even after unpacking! Bedroom #4 offers you a taste of indoor/outdoor living with it’s double windows the open to the great outdoors. Imagine how peaceful your next midday nap would be – lying indoors as the warm breeze envelopes you. Tranquility is key in this nautical-themed dorm, as an ocean blue palate fills the room, complimented by two pristine white twin beds, each featuring built-in storage. And be sure to take advantage of this room’s rolling blackout shades – perfect for a good night’s sleep! Now, it is officially party time! Dancing high above are an endless string of lights, creating a lush garden backdrop for this cozy outdoor private patio! Invite some friends over and fire-up the grill or pop on some music and lazy in the shade beneath the trees on the cozy patio furniture, offering the best in sink-in comfort. Need to cooldown? Take a midday swim or late-night dip in your own private resort-style pool. The one-of-a-kind outdoor living space is great for everything from lounging to living it up. In addition, you will find a stunning, spacious garden, as well as an ultra-convenient outdoor shower and bathroom.194

rentals.name: 5BR Authentic Aruban Designer Retreat | Walk to the Beach
rentals.notes: This 5-bedroom, 3 Bath designer getaway is as authentic as it gets! Recently updated, this home showcases an endless array of custom fixtures, furnishings, and artwork by local Aruban artisans and craftsmen. Conveniently located just across the street from the Noord Supermarket and Eduardo’s Hideaway, this tropical haven is only a stroll away from picturesque white sand beaches that offer a full day of fun in the sun. Step into a spacious open concept, featuring dark wood vaulted ceilings that generously contrast against the cream palette beneath. Bathed in natural light, the entire floor offers cool tiled flooring and plenty of room to relax, recharge, and rejuvenate. It only takes a moment inside to notice that this home is dripping with style. And rightfully so, as it was personally handled by an Interior Decorator and Designer. Keep looking, and you’ll even find locally-inspired artwork by a native artist. Open the sliding glass doors and enjoy a little indoor/outdoor living, as you read a good book upon the rounded armchair. Or kick your feet up and stay a while, as a sleek sectional with a built-in chaise lounge and massive wall-mounted flat-screen television makes sure you don’t have a care in the world. And when it is time for a drink or two, take advantage of the chic coffee tables at your disposal – offering both form and function. Bring the family together with a home-cooked meal inside this amazing kitchen, made by a true Aruban craftsman. You can feel the love and intention behind each stunning element as you make your way around the galley. The kitchen features built-in stainless-steel appliances, gorgeous countertops, and a remarkable gunmetal tile backsplash. Grab a cup of coffee from your own personal Nespresso Vertuo machine. This generous layout allows plenty of room to cook, prep, and entertain. 194
