Right above peaceful Rodgers Beach Whether you’re dreaming of a romantic getaway, a peaceful retreat, or simply a place to breathe and recharge, Sea La Vie Aruba is your invitation to relax and live the sea life you’ve been craving. P.S. This Brand New Condo is also for Sale. You can message me for any information or viewing! Read More Sea La Vie Aruba – Your Oceanfront Escape Awaits Perched right above Rodgers Beach in peaceful Seroe Colorado, this elegant 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom condo offers breathtaking ocean views from nearly every corner. Slide open the doors and step onto your private terrace, where the sea breeze greets you each morning and golden skies close your day. It’s the perfect spot for sunrise coffee, long conversations over dinner, or quiet moments of stillness with nothing but the sound of the water below. Inside, the space feels effortlessly calm and inviting — soft neutral tones, natural textures, and wide windows that bring the ocean right into the living room. The condo comes with a fully equipped kitchen, in-unit laundry, and cozy, hotel-style bedrooms that make every night feel luxurious. This tranquil corner of Aruba is known for its serenity — a hidden gem where time slows down and stress fades away. And with 24/7 property management service, you’ll always have local support just a message away. Whether you’re dreaming of a romantic getaway, a peaceful retreat, or simply a place to breathe and recharge, Sea La Vie Aruba is your invitation to relax, reconnect, and live the sea life you’ve been craving. Guest access From the moment you set foot inside this Condo, it becomes all yours….. -your home away from home.

rentals.name: Savaneta Sunset Villa on the Beach
rentals.notes: The house: A beautiful villa on the water, the only house in Aruba that is really on the water. It has 3 bedrooms, 1 office that can be converted into an extra bedroom, 3 bathrooms, a full-service kitchen, a laundry room, a front porch, a pier, a large deck 7 feet above the water, a liquor lounge, a relaxing dining area, and a bbq grill. A total of 5000 sq ft of home away from home, fully decorated with all the artistic works of the owner. Read More Amenities: We offer free transportation from and to the airport for when you arrive and go back. Ask us for any additional service you might like, such as daily maid service, private Chef, or any type of rental. Location: Walking distance to The Old Man and The Sea restaurant, Zee-rovers (local fisherman’s restaurant and bar), and supermarkets. 10 minutes away from Baby Beach. 10 minutes away from Oranjestad and 25 minutes away from the high-rise hotels. What makes our place unique: This place is unique because of its beautiful deck hovering above the Caribbean Sea overlooking the sunset every day. No need to go to the beach, you’re already on it. Hear the sound of the sea …….priceless. Ideal for honeymooners, small families, quick getaways, snorkeling, swimming, etc. Guest Access Guests will have access to the complete house including Wifi, cable TV, DVD players, Kitchen, Deck, All 3 bathrooms, and a laundry room. Should you have any special requests please send us an email and we will respond accordingly. Interaction with Guests We will pick you up from the airport and bring you back when your stay is over. The house will be vacant when you get here. Guests can call us for any assistance, but we respect our guest’s privacy very much. Let us know what else we can do for you. The Neighborhood Savaneta is the former Capital of Aruba. From 1000 AD to 1636 when Aruba was occupied by the Dutch, to when Aruba gained independence within the Dutch kingdom in 1986, remnants of its history can still be seen in its diverse culture in this neighborhood. Truly an Aruban location and experience. Safety One of the safest places on the island. You can take a stroll at night and people are very friendly to give you advice. Everyone knows everyone here. Roads The streets are well maintained and are less than a minute’s drive to the main road that will take you to Baby Beach (make a right) or Downtown (make a left). Getting Around Taxies regularly pass by because of local restaurants nearby, but best if called ahead. Other Things to Note Great for snorkeling and swimming.

rentals.name: Noord Ocean View Home with Rooftop Terrace!
rentals.notes: Welcome to your own piece of paradise, complete with a breathtaking ocean view! This 3-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom vacation home has been recently renovated and meticulously designed to bring comfort and convenience center stage. The moment you lay your eyes on this immaculate exterior, you will immediately be taken by the Spanish-influenced iron gate, terracotta roofing, towering archways, and stately shutters. The kitchen comes with handsome wood furnishing, from cabinets and doors with fine crafted molding and stainless-steel pulls, making extra storage a breeze! A range hood, gorgeous granite countertop, and bevy of useful appliances can be found around every corner. Last but not least, a series of windows with outdoor viewing and a center kitchen island completes the room. This versatile galley is perfect for dining, entertaining, or whipping up a fresh batch of margaritas. The dining room features a beautiful round supper table, set for a party of six. The dark highbacked chairs contrast perfectly with the light granite tabletop, rivaled only by the stunning view from beyond the window. The family room is guaranteed to bring your entire crew together! Here, you will uncover a cozy couch and sofa, along with a flat-screen television, and additional guest seating! Take advantage of some of that indoor/outdoor island living by opening up the sliding glass doors and letting the breeze work the room! Bedroom #1 brings forth a king size bed, stately armoire, and an unbeatable view of your outdoor haven. This Master Suite also comes equipped with an en suite bathroom, showcasing a luxurious tiled interior with a floating vanity, large contemporary mirror, and more! Bedroom #2 hosts a queen size bed, Along with a trundle bed, matching nightstands, and an en suite bathroom that offers both luxury and privacy. Bedroom #3 highlights a queen size bed set against a wooden headboard with matching nightstands. In addition, you will find a trundle bed adding extra sleeping arrangements for you and your guests. This bedroom has its own en suite bathroom, staged with all the trappings and more! Ready to really heat things up? Head outside to your exclusive private patio where a bar, resort-style pool, lounge furniture, and tiki hut await. Enjoy spending your days basking in the sun, while your nights are taken over by starry skies, as the sound of gentle waves lull you into a sweet, serene and peaceful slumber. Showcasing an exquisite ocean view from the rooftop terrace, this tropical retreat is built for island-dwellers, beachcombers, and anyone with a love of the finer things! -Property Notes- UTILITIES: All utilities are INCLUDED. (Keep this in mind when comparing rentals as this cost is most often not included). TAXES: The following mandatory taxes are included: Government Tax: 12.5% Environmental Tax (as per Aruba tax code): $3 per night Taxes may be subject to change. CHECK-IN/ CHECK-OUT: Check-in time is 4:00 PM. Check-out time is 11:00 AM. Earlier check-ins and later check-out can be requested 24 hours before and will be granted depending on availability. A surcharge may apply. HOUSEKEEPING: This is a self catering vacation home and as such you are expected to do your own shopping and regular cleaning. We do offer the option of daily or mid-stay, hotel-style cleaning services. This is an extra service and a surcharge applies. Start-up supplies are provided and will be restocked if you request our optional daily or mid-stay hotel-style cleaning service. We provide 1 set bath linen per person max occupancy; extra sets are available at a surcharge. BEACH ESSENTIALS: We provide beach chairs (6), beach towels and a cooler. We do not provide snorkeling equipment or umbrellas. CONCIERGE SERVICE: Our Guest Relations Team can assist with making arrangements for transportation, private chefs, yachts, and other vacation activities. CAMERA(S): This home has a camera outside at the front of the home with a view of the entrance and street.194

rentals.name: Oranjestad, 5 bedroom villa with a pool
rentals.notes: About this space Luxurious 5-BR Villa in the heart of Oranjestad – Sleeps standard 10 pax – Max 12 pax for additional charge. Modern elegance meets ultimate comfort in this opulent retreat. Chic decor, gourmet kitchen, and spacious living areas await. Five bedrooms ensure a comfortable stay. Outdoor paradise with pool, hot tub, and bar area. Short stroll to the beach and vibrant center. Perfect for a dream getaway where luxury meets convenience. Book your stay now for an unforgettable escape! Read More The space Welcome to your dream getaway at our exquisite luxury villa in the heart of Oranjestad! This stunning vacation property promises an opulent escape, blending modern elegance with ultimate comfort. Let us paint a picture of the lavish retreat that awaits you. As you step into the villa, you are greeted by the expansive living room adorned with chic decor. The spacious area features a large dining table with seating for eight, perfect for shared meals and memorable evenings. Sink into the embrace of the plush L-shaped sofa while enjoying your favorite shows on the smart TV, surrounded by sliding doors that open to both a serene sitting area and the enticing outdoors. The gourmet kitchen beckons with top-notch appliances, including a built-in oven, microwave, and dishwasher. A sizable fridge ensures you have everything you need for culinary delights, making this space a haven for food enthusiasts. Indulge in the lap of luxury within the master bedroom, boasting a king-sized bed, a sitting area, and a generous television. The en-suite bathroom is a spa-like oasis, featuring a soothing bath, a spacious shower with dual showerheads, two sinks, and a separate toilet. A colossal walk-in closet adds a touch of extravagance to your stay. The second and third bedrooms offer queen-sized beds, individual TVs, ample closet space, and convenient workspaces for those who need to balance business with pleasure. The third bedroom even grants direct access to the outside, embracing the tropical surroundings. A separate bathroom in the hallway ensures comfort and convenience for all guests, featuring a large shower, washing table, and toilet. Step into the outdoor paradise, where a large, covered patio beckons with a 10-chair dining table and an inviting L-shaped bench overlooking the pool. The focal point is the expansive pool, complemented by a hot tub, shower, and a convenient toilet. The outdoor bar area, equipped with six stools, a BBQ, wine cooler, and TV, promises unforgettable evenings under the stars. For those seeking privacy, an upstairs studio offers a king-sized bed, a pull-out bed, and an en-suite bathroom. Revel in your own space with a TV and ample closet room. Adjacent to the pool, a cozy downstairs bedroom awaits with a full-sized bed and an en-suite bathroom featuring a toilet and shower. This luxurious villa is not only an oasis of comfort but also conveniently located just a short stroll from the beach and the vibrant center of Oranjestad. Immerse yourself in the local entertainment scene, boasting restaurants, bars, shops, a casino, and even a cinema. Your perfect vacation starts here, where luxury meets convenience, and relaxation meets excitement. Book your stay at our stunning villa for an unforgettable escape!

rentals.name: Noord – Ocean Breeze 1-Bedroom Apartment
rentals.notes: Relax and enjoy at this Central/Modern 1-bedroom Apartment located 6 minutes by car from the beaches, restaurants, and resorts. Enjoy the white sand of Aruba, One Happy Island! Once you’re done sightseeing, retreat to the charming Apartment that will be your Caribbean home, whose cozy design and 24/7 open outside pool will leave you in awe. Welcome to your Apartment, which will be your cozy Caribbean home with a private terrace for you to enjoy the outdoors inside and out. Ample parking, private and free. And pool with night lighting after 7 pm. And can’t forget beautiful sunrises and sunsets on the roof of Panoramic Terrace! Read More Other things to note Access to the apartments is fully paved. The best way to get around Aruba is by rental car. The Airport “Queen Beatrix” is only 8-10 minutes away. It will take you only 45 minutes from the Arashi beach in Noord to the baby beach in San Nicolaas, and your experience will be amazing for sure. Ride your car and you are less than 6 minutes from “Eagle Beach”, one of the most beautiful beaches in Aruba, Number 1 in the Caribbean and Number 2 in the World. Restaurants: Nikkei Sushi Bar, Fermin’s Bar BBQ, Ceviches Pool Bar. Supermarkets: Super Food Plaza, Super Doit Center Shaba, Save More Supermarket, and Various Mini Markets. Gym Fit Factory, Citgo Sasaki Gas Station, and Citgo Palm Beach. Pharmacies: Botica di Servicio Noord and Botica Santa Ana. We invite you to stay with us in this comfortable area for your vacation. **Cleaning fee $150, and $100 security deposit**

rentals.name: Eagle Beach – 3-Bedroom Sea Front Condo
rentals.notes: Super High Season 21/22 Dec 19, 2021 – Jan 05, 2022 1,188/nt, 7,815.5/wk, 35,640 /mo, 7 nts min Wake up to spectacular views of Eagle Beach in this Three-bedroom condo; a luxurious vacation rental accommodation located at the Beach Resort Aruba, the newest vacation rental resort on the island of Aruba! Featuring a balcony stretching across the living room and master bedroom with tropical views of the resort’s luscious landscaping and the award-winning Eagle Beach, just a few steps away. The balcony is complete with comfortable furniture to enjoy the Aruban weather any time of day and spectacular sunsets. The spacious, open-plan living area comes with a fully-equipped kitchen and a large center island with 4-barstools. The living area boasts a 5-seat corner sectional sofa, an armchair, a chair with an ottoman, a 55″ Smart TV (Netflix enabled), a 6-seat dining table, and access to the balcony with stunning views. The corridor lends access to a half-bathroom and laundry room with a washer and dryer. The blue and green decorations against the neutral modern furnishings in the living area are a seamless reflection of the sea and sands that await outside. The master bedroom has a king-size bed, a 32″ TV, a walk-in closet, an armchair, and access to the balcony with stunning views. The master bedroom has a modern en-suite bathroom with a 2-sink vanity, a glass-enclosed shower and toilet, and a free-standing bathtub to soak and unwind during your stay. The second bedroom has a king-size bed, a TV, a built-in closet, and a full modern en-suite bathroom. And the third bedroom has a queen-size bed, a TV, a built-in closet, and a full modern en-suite bathroom. This unit provides you with 2,120 square feet of living space, a code-lock safety box, free unlimited high-speed WiFi (LeVent Aruba is the first resort on the island to have high-speed fiber-optic cabling), cable TV, and four flat-screen TV’s (in the living room and each bedroom). This unit is located on the left corridor off the elevators on the third floor. Sleeps 6 guests in 3 beds. The outdoor facilities of LeVent Beach Resort Aruba include a spectacular resort swimming pool with a Hot Tub and a children’s pool. There is also a children’s playground and a communal alfresco dining area with two BBQ grills, an outdoor sink plus an ice machine. Several sunny or shaded lounge areas to enjoy the tranquility of the resort with its luxurious furnishings and luscious tropical landscaping. On-site there is also a gym room, a mini-market, a Massage & Therapy Spa (Blue Waters Day Spa), and a resort communal rooftop area to enjoy Aruba’s sunsets. Free parking within the 24/7 security-gated resort complex. For all our Prestige guests, upon check-in, you will receive your beach towels, which can be exchanged once a day and free of charge at our Prestige LeVent desk in the lobby. All the LeVent rental properties managed by Prestige Vacations Aruba are also provided with portable beach chairs that can be taken to the beach. LeVent Beach Resort Aruba, a luxury vacation rental resort, is located just a few steps away from the world-famous Eagle Beach, well-known for its 50-yards wide pristine soft white sand, turquoise waters, and breath-taking sunsets. Several water sports companies, beach bars, and restaurants are located along the Eagle Beach boulevard, easily walkable. Within about 0.6 miles away there are 2 casinos and a supermarket – Super Food Plaza – for all your grocery shopping requirements. PR

rentals.name: Boutique Hotel on the Beach
rentals.notes: Sleeps 8 Guests This is a fantastic choice for those seeking luxury overwater villas or beach villas experience in the Caribbean. Aruba’s only overwater villas and beach villas are located in the small town of Savaneta. Surrounded by the crystal clear Caribbean Sea, this is the perfect place to slip into the soothing pace of paradise. Its quietness, peace, and relaxed ambiance make you feel like you are having the island for yourself! Low season rate Tax not included Cleaning fees are not included

rentals.name: Bakval – 10-Studio Estate Walk to Marriott Beach
rentals.notes: Estate with 10 bedroom studios. Located in Palm Beach, 1640 feet from Palm Beach. These Suites provide accommodations with an outdoor swimming pool, free private parking, a garden, and barbecue facilities. Among the facilities at this property are a 24-hour front desk and room service and free WiFi throughout the property. The hotel features an indoor pool and a concierge service. The hotel offers a terrace. The nearest airport is Queen Beatrix International Airport, 5.6 mi from Yoyita Suites Aruba. Read More Property Highlights: 10 Studio Apartments – Each unit includes one private bathroom and is designed for comfort and efficiency. A few studios are equipped with separate beds, making them ideal for flexible guest arrangements. Prime Location – Just steps away from Aruba’s best beaches, restaurants, shops, and nightlife. High Rental Potential – Located in one of the island’s most visited areas, making it perfect for short-term vacation rentals, boutique hospitality, or mixed-use concepts. Emerging Development – A rare opportunity to invest early in a growing project with excellent future value and ROI.

rentals.name: San Nicolas – BeachFront Villa with Pool, Sleeps 16, Dining, & Tub
rentals.notes: The newly renovated beachfront villa is designed to offer a comfortable getaway to all visitors for a perfect Aruba vacation. Its cozy setting and breathtaking surroundings offer levels of relaxation you haven’t felt before. The inviting indoors offers a mix of modern amenities and beautiful furnishing with an abundance of natural light accenting the bright tones of the entire home. Every inch of space is well-used, which is best visible from the fully equipped kitchen that opens to the tastefully furnished living room with an inviting dining area. A total of six highly comfortable bedrooms will provide all the relaxation you need after an unforgettable day of Aruba sightseeing and beach hopping. The private backyard is immersed in picturesque natural surroundings offering million-dollar ocean views, direct beach access, and luxurious amenities like the infinity swimming pool and hot tub. Please note that the weekly rate does not cover the taxes and cleaning fees that may apply.

rentals.name: Noord – Beautiful Home With Pool
rentals.notes: Nestled just minutes away from the tourist hub, high-rise hotels, and the bustling heart of the island, our villa invites you to discover the best of Aruba’s attractions. Indulge in world-class dining at nearby restaurants, shop at vibrant shopping centers, and stock up on groceries at Superfood, just a 5-minute drive away. And when it’s time for relaxation, Palm & Eagle beaches, ranked among the best in the world, are just steps from your door. Our reviews speak volumes—guests consistently share their best vacation experiences. Make the right choice and discover why La Casa Piu Bella is the key to the best vacation ever in Aruba. A beautiful Aruba estate home with a capacity to hold up to 20 persons. You’ll have this entire luxurious villa to yourself and your guests. This Aruba villa is located in a prime location near Eagle Beach and the best restaurants in Aruba. • 8 bedrooms • 4 bathrooms For that perfect occasion, you are looking to share quality time with family, friends or colleagues. Any kind of celebration such as Weddings, Anniversaries, Renewal of vows, birthdays or just to get away and have the vacation of your dreams, This is the perfect accommodation for you.

rentals.name: Noord – Spectaculair 8-Bedroom Villa with Huge Pool
rentals.notes: Welcome to Your Ultimate Aruba Escape Experience the best of luxury island living in this breathtaking 3-story villa! Designed to host large families or groups of up to 24 guests, this exceptional property combines comfort, elegance, and convenience, just minutes from Aruba’s stunning beaches and vibrant Palm Beach district. Step into your tropical retreat and discover expansive living spaces thoughtfully designed for relaxation and togetherness. The open-concept living room features plush seating and a smart TV, flowing seamlessly into a modern kitchen outfitted with stainless steel appliances and everything you need to cook and entertain. A large dining table — perfect for shared meals and special celebrations. Read More Outdoors, a private oasis awaits. Take a refreshing dip in the oversized pool, soak in the hot tub under the stars, or unwind in one of the many lounge areas surrounded by lush greenery. Fire up the BBQ for an al fresco dinner and rinse off in the outdoor shower after a day in the sun. The upper-level balcony with sunset views offers an idyllic spot for evening drinks or relaxed dining. This spacious villa features 8 beautifully appointed bedrooms and 11 bathrooms, ensuring both comfort and privacy for every guest: Bedroom 1 : King-size bed, smart TV, en-suite with walk-in shower Bedroom 2 : Two king-size beds, smart TV, en-suite with walk-in shower Bedroom 3 : King-size bed, smart TV, en-suite with walk-in shower Bedroom 4 : Ideal for families with a king, double, and queen bed, smart TV, en-suite Bedroom 5 : King-size bed, smart TV, en-suite with walk-in shower Bedroom 6 : Cozy and intimate with a queen-size bed Bedroom 7 : King and queen-size beds, smart TV, en-suite with walk-in shower Bedroom 8 : Private guest apartment with king-size bed, smart TV, and en-suite bathroom Additional comforts include a washer and dryer, high-speed WiFi, and essential beach gear like chairs, towels, and a cooler. Located just a five-minute drive from Aruba’s best beaches and a six-minute drive from shops, restaurants, and nightlife, this villa strikes the perfect balance between relaxation and adventure. Good to Know Utilities : All utilities are included in your stay — a rare benefit compared to many other rentals. Taxes : Government tax (12.5%) and environmental fee ($3/night) are included. Security : The property is equipped with a security camera facing the front entrance. Please note: Rates may vary depending on the season, length of stay, and demand. Pricing may be higher during holidays and peak periods. For the most accurate rates, please check our calendar or contact us directly before booking.

rentals.name: Oranjestad – 4-Bedroom Luxury Villa with Pool | Sleeps 10 Guests
rentals.notes: Wake up to the soft glow of sunlight and pool views right from your bed—it’s the kind of calm that makes you want to stay just a little longer. The open living room is bright and airy, with high ceilings and comfy seating that’s perfect for hanging out, watching a movie, or just enjoying slow mornings with family or friends. Start your day with coffee under the shaded patio and end it with a dip in the private pool as the sun goes down. Whether you’re reading a book, sipping wine, or just taking in the breeze, this outdoor space is made for total relaxation. The dining area flows effortlessly from indoors to out, great for family dinners, casual brunches, or cocktails with friends. And with big walk-in closets, you’ll have plenty of space to unpack, settle in, and feel right at home. Everything here is designed to feel easy, welcoming, and just right for making memories together. ★ LIVING ROOM ★ Kick back on the oversized sectional sofa—there’s room for everyone to stretch out and relax. Open the glass doors and let the warm breeze drift in while you enjoy pool views, a movie on the big screen TV, or a good chat with friends.169

rentals.name: Aruba Vacation Rental – Noord – 5-Bedroom Private Villa with Pool
rentals.notes: As soon as you step through the imposing entrance gate into this amazing luxurious villa, you’ll be welcomed by a large super stylish yet highly comfortable open-plan indoor outdoor living space with fabulous interior design, and a wonderful landscaped garden with private pool, large covered pavilion with sofas and sun loungers to relax on and a shaded dining area with a custom artisan dining table. The five spacious bedroom suites offer ample room for rest and relaxation. Large windows provide an abundance of natural light, creating a bright and inviting atmosphere. The spacious living area has its own cinema area and is beautifully designed with elegant furnishings and modern amenities, ensuring that your stay is both comfortable and memorable. The outdoor area is a true oasis, with a large sparkling pool that invites you to take a refreshing dip and bask in the sunshine. Enjoy a drink at the outdoor bar or grill your favorite meal on the BBQ, while surrounded by the natural beauty of the landscape. The lush greenery of the surrounding trees and plants creates a peaceful and serene environment that will soothe your soul. Whether you’re seeking a getaway for friends or a family vacation, our villa has everything you need for an unforgettable stay. The entire space is yours, there are no shared amenities, and you can enjoy your stay in complete privacy. Relax in the sun by the pool on the loungers or in the shade at the dining table, or on the sofas in the pavilion. Hop easily between the beach and the pool, and for entertainment, a little water volleyball, and at the end of the day, retreat to the comfortable bedroom suites, which feature 5☆resort comforts. 169

rentals.name: Ocean Front 8-Bedroom Villa – Sleeps 18 Guests
rentals.notes: Ever wish you could open your front door and find yourself face-to-face with the blue horizon? Well, feast your eyes on this showstopping, jaw-dropping Ocean Front Villa, located right on the Malmok strip! This modern 8-bedroom, 7-bathroom dream home is dripping with sunlight and features a modern, clean, white interior designed to put your needs first. Now, enter a haven that you must see to believe! This unique 2-story white octagonal home provides optimal floor to ceiling panoramic views of stunning oceanic vistas, along with a gym, televisions in each room, plenty of poolside lounge chairs, a private backyard pool, and a separate apartment that comes equipped with two bedrooms. The kitchen is displayed in truly opulent fashion, with a bevy of useful appliances, a sea glass backsplash, and deluxe island that can double as a charming breakfast nook. Just a few feet away sits the beautiful banquet area with a gorgeous view, staged appropriately for a party of ten. Whether you’re looking to have a private candlelight dinner or large family celebration, this dining room is sure to please. Four of the bedrooms in the home feature a king-size bed, the fifth bedroom features a queen-size bed, and the sixth bedroom features 2 twin-size beds. The poolside apartment hosts 2 bedrooms that both feature queen-size beds and attached bathrooms. Meanwhile, the entire 2nd floor is devoted to the main bedroom suite. This lavish bedroom holds a bed in the middle of the room that faces the ocean, luring you to greet each morning with the alluring sights and stirring sounds of the ocean calling and end each night with the most beautiful view of the sunset. Head over to the home office, which is connected to the upstairs bedroom, the office is conveniently set up with a glass-top desk, rolling computer chair, a printer, and a black leather couch, which doubles as a sleeper sofa for extra guests. Now you can finally catch up on correspondence, finish that book you’ve been meaning to get around to or even have two extra guest join your party. Tranquility takes center stage as you withdraw to your private bathroom. Heavily influenced by contemporary spas, each room offers clean lines, commodious storage, stall glass walk-in showers, and fine fixtures throughout. Both the family room and den showcase an ultra-wide sectional, accommodating guest seating, and an impressive array of vibrant décor. No island vacation is complete without booking some valuable time outside on your own private veranda. Here, you will uncover a remarkable resort-worthy pool, surrounded by lounge chairs and landscaping. In addition, there is a dining area and bar with an outdoor sink. Just imagine how wonderful it would be to dine al fresco, as you splash away your days playing under the sun and retire each night with a late-night dip beneath the stars! Located just minutes from Ritz Carlton and the high-rise area, this luxurious getaway promises romantic sunset views over the water and a warm breeze to complement it. Out of all the ocean front homes on the market, this is the most prime location on the island. -Property Notes- UTILITIES: All utilities are INCLUDED. (Keep this in mind when comparing rentals as this cost is most often not included). TAXES: The following mandatory taxes are included: Government Tax: 12.5% Environmental Tax (as per Aruba tax code): $3 per night Taxes may be subject to change. CHECK-IN/ CHECK-OUT: Check-in time is 4:00 PM. Check-out time is 11:00 AM. Earlier check-ins and later check-out can be requested 24 hours before and will be granted depending on availability. A surcharge may apply. HOUSEKEEPING: This is a self catering vacation home and as such you are expected to do your own shopping and regular cleaning. We do offer the option of daily or mid-stay, hotel-style cleaning services. This is an extra service and a surcharge applies. Start-up supplies are provided and will be restocked if you request our optional daily or mid-stay hotel-style cleaning service. We provide 1 set bath linen per person max occupancy; extra sets are available at a surcharge. BEACH ESSENTIALS: We provide beach chairs (6), beach towels and a cooler. We do not provide snorkeling equipment or umbrellas. CONCIERGE SERVICE: Our Guest Relations Team can assist with making arrangements for transportation, private chefs, yachts, and other vacation activities. CAMERA(S): This home has a camera outside at the front of the home with a view of the entrance and street. NOTE: The spa shown in the pool picture is not a hot tub. NOTE: The ice dispenser shown in the picture is not operational. 194
